select.isEqual: SELECT name, width, colname FROM TBL_LISTOPTION WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND listtype = #v_LISTTYPE# AND dtype IS NULL ORDER BY sn
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT
name AS name,
name2 AS name,
name3 AS name,
name4 AS name,
width, colname FROM TBL_LISTOPTION WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND listtype = #v_LISTTYPE# AND dtype IS NULL ORDER BY sn

LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.DOCID = GRP.DOCID
WHERE
aprmemberid = #v_USERID#
aprmemberid IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND SHAREUSERID = #v_USERID#)
AND aprtype <> '015'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE = '004'
AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FormID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.OrgDocID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocType, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocState, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FunctionType, TBL_APRDOCINFO.Href, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocTitle, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocNo, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HasAttachYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HasOpinionYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.StartDate, TBL_APRDOCINFO.EndDate, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterName, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterJobTitle, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterDeptID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterDeptName, TBL_APRDOCINFO.isPublic, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterName2, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterJobTitle2, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterDeptName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ReceivedDate, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FormName, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FormName2, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.UrgentApproval, TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS COMPANYNAME, TBL_DEPTMASTER.COMPNM2 AS COMPANYNAME2 FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT DOCID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY) TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID IN
#v_USERIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType = '015' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState = '010' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY.DOCID IS NULL
AND DOCNO LIKE '%' || #DOCNO# || '%'
AND DocTitle LIKE '%' || #DOCTITLE# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #WRITERNAME# || '%'
AND WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #WRITERNAME# || '%'
AND WriterDeptName2 LIKE '%' || #WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%'
AND WriterDeptName LIKE '%' || #WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%'

AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID IN (SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
AND FormID = #FORMID#
AND (FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #FORMNAME# || '%' OR FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.DOCID IN (SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\')

ORDER BY hasattachyn, startdate

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.SN, CONCAT(CONCAT(A.OWNERID, '@'), A.SN) AS DOCID, A.FORMID, A.ORGDOCID, A.DOCTYPE, A.DOCSTATE, A.FUNCTIONTYPE, A.HREF, A.DOCTITLE, A.DOCNO, A.HASATTACHYN, A.HASOPINIONYN, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERJOBTITLE, A.WRITERDEPTID, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.ISPUBLIC, A.WriterName2, A.WriterJobTitle2, A.WriterDeptName2, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2, B.URGENTAPPROVAL, A.OWNERID, A.TENANT_ID, A.COMPANYID, GRP.TABSN FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.OWNERID = B.OWNERID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.SN = B.SN LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON A.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND CONCAT(CONCAT(A.OWNERID, '@'), A.SN) = GRP.DOCID ) WHERE OWNERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND NVL(TABSN, 1) = 1
AND DOCNO LIKE '%' || #DOCNO# || '%'
AND DocTitle LIKE '%' || #DOCTITLE# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #WRITERNAME# || '%'
AND WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #WRITERNAME# || '%'
AND WriterDeptName2 LIKE '%' || #WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%'
AND WriterDeptName LIKE '%' || #WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%'
AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#APRSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#APRENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND COMPANYID = #searchCompanyID#
AND DOCID IN (SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), SN) FROM TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #KEYWORD#), '%'))
AND FormID = #FORMID#
AND (FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #FORMNAME# || '%' OR FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
AND URGENTAPPROVAL = #URGENTAPPROVAL#
AND FUNCTIONTYPE = #searchStatus#
ORDER BY doctitle DESC, startdate DESC
ORDER BY doctitle, startdate DESC
ORDER BY writername DESC, startdate DESC
ORDER BY writername, startdate DESC
ORDER BY writerdeptname DESC, startdate DESC
ORDER BY writerdeptname, startdate DESC
ORDER BY startdate DESC
ORDER BY startdate

ORDER BY functiontype, startdate DESC
ORDER BY formname DESC, startdate DESC
ORDER BY formname, startdate DESC
ORDER BY hasattachyn DESC, startdate DESC
ORDER BY hasattachyn, startdate DESC
ORDER BY ispublic DESC, startdate DESC
ORDER BY ispublic, startdate DESC
ORDER BY startdate DESC
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#) A

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN (SELECT DOCID, DOCSTATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO) TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE ((TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = '011' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE != '011' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID#)) AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = '015' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND DOCNO LIKE '%' || #DOCNO# || '%'
AND DocTitle LIKE '%' || #DOCTITLE# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #WRITERNAME# || '%'
AND WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #WRITERNAME# || '%'
AND WriterDeptName2 LIKE '%' || #WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%'
AND WriterDeptName LIKE '%' || #WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%'
AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#APRSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#APRENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #searchCompanyID#

AND URGENTAPPROVAL = #URGENTAPPROVAL#
AND FUNCTIONTYPE = #searchStatus#

select.isEqual: SELECT TBL_RECORD.RecordID , TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode RECDEPTCODE , TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName RECDEPTNAME , TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate , TBL_RECORD.RegisterYear , TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo , TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle , TBL_RECORD.DrafterName , TBL_RECORD.ExecuteDate , TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName , TBL_RECORD.DeliveryNo , TBL_RECORD.ProduceDeptRegNo , TBL_RECORD.ElectronicRecFlag , TBL_RECORD.OldRecordFlag , TBL_RECORD.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBL_RECORD.AttachFlag , TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag , TBL_RECORD.CreateDate RECCREATEDATE , TBL_RECORD.ManualRegFlag , TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo , TBSEPATT.RegisterType , TBSEPATT.Title RECTITLE , TBSEPATT.NumOfPage , TBSEPATT.ModifyFlag , TBSEPATT.CreateDate , TBAV.Summary , TBAV.RecordType , TBOLD.CreateOrganName , TBOLD.RecordNo , TBOLD.KeepingPeriod RECKP , SUBSTR(TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo, -6) RECREGSN FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBSEPATT.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_AUDIO_VISUALRECEXINFO TBAV ON TBSEPATT.RecordID = TBAV.RecordID AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = TBAV.SeperateAttachNo AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBAV.TENANT_ID AND TBSEPATT.COMPANYID = TBAV.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_OLDRECORDEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBOLD.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBOLD.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_RECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT TBL_RECORD.RecordID , TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode RECDEPTCODE , NVL(TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName2, TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName) RECDEPTNAME , TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate , TBL_RECORD.RegisterYear , TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo , NVL(TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle2, TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle) APRMEMBERTITLE , NVL(TBL_RECORD.DrafterName2, TBL_RECORD.DrafterName) DRAFTERNAME , TBL_RECORD.ExecuteDate , NVL(TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName2, TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName) RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , TBL_RECORD.DeliveryNo , TBL_RECORD.ProduceDeptRegNo , TBL_RECORD.ElectronicRecFlag , TBL_RECORD.OldRecordFlag , TBL_RECORD.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBL_RECORD.AttachFlag , TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag , TBL_RECORD.CreateDate RECCREATEDATE , TBL_RECORD.ManualRegFlag , TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo , TBSEPATT.RegisterType , TBSEPATT.Title RECTITLE , TBSEPATT.NumOfPage , TBSEPATT.ModifyFlag , TBSEPATT.CreateDate , TBAV.Summary , TBAV.RecordType , TBOLD.CreateOrganName , NVL(TBOLD.CreateOrganName2, TBOLD.CreateOrganName) CREATEORGANNAME , TBOLD.RecordNo , TBOLD.KeepingPeriod RECKP , SUBSTR(TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo, -6) RECREGSN FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBSEPATT.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_AUDIO_VISUALRECEXINFO TBAV ON TBSEPATT.RecordID = TBAV.RecordID AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = TBAV.SeperateAttachNo AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBAV.TENANT_ID AND TBSEPATT.COMPANYID = TBAV.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_OLDRECORDEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBOLD.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBOLD.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_RECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#

isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberID , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberIsDeptYN , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName , NVL(TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName) APRMEMBERNAME2 , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptID , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName , NVL(TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName) APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberLDAPPath , TBL_APRLINEINFO.ReceivedDate , TBL_APRLINEINFO.ProcessDate , TBL_APRLINEINFO.isProposerYN , TBL_APRLINEINFO.isBriefUserYN , TBL_APRLINEINFO.ReasonDoNotApprov , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.orguserid , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserid , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyusername , NVL(TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyusername2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyusername) PROXYUSERNAME2 , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle , NVL(TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle) PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2 , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptid , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname , NVL(TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname) PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.docid AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.aprmemberSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN DESC
isEqual.isEqual: SELECT TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DocID , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprType , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprState , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberID , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberIsDeptYN , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberName , NVL(TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberName2, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberName) APRMEMBERNAME2 , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle2, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptID , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName , NVL(TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName2, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName) APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberLDAPPath , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.ReceivedDate , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.ProcessDate , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.isProposerYN , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.isBriefUserYN , TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.orguserid , TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyuserid , TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyusername , NVL(TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyusername2, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyusername) PROXYUSERNAME2 , TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle , NVL(TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle2, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle) PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2 , TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptid , TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname , NVL(TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname2, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname) PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE ON TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.docid AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.aprmemberSN AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT #v_DOCID#, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE , APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, '', '', ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, REASONDONOTAPPROVAL, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #beforeDocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, '001' AS APRSTATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, ' ' AS RECEIVEDDATE, ' ' AS PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT A.OWNERID || '@' || CAST(A.SN AS VARCHAR(20)) AS DOCID, A.APRMEMBERSN, A.APRTYPE, A.APRSTATE, A.APRMEMBERID, A.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, A.APRMEMBERNAME, A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, A.APRMEMBERDEPTID, A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, A.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, A.RECEIVEDDATE, A.PROCESSDATE, A.ISPROPOSERYN, A.ISBRIEFUSERYN, A.REASONDONOTAPPROV, A.AprMemberName2, A.AprMemberJobTitle2, A.AprMemberDeptName2, B.ORGUSERID, B.PROXYUSERID, B.PROXYUSERNAME, B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, B.PROXYUSERDEPTID, B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME , A.TENANT_ID, A.COMPANYID FROM TBL_TMPAPRLINEINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_TMPEXPAPRLINE B ON A.OWNERID = B.OWNERID AND A.SN = B.SN AND A.APRMEMBERSN = B.APRMEMBERSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID ) A WHERE A.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN desc
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME desc
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE desc
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME desc
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE desc, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE desc, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
TBL_APRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE
TBL_APRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE desc
ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN DESC

isEqual.isGreaterEqual: SELECT DOCID , PROCESSORID , RECEIVEDDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID# AND PROCESSORID = #v_PAPRUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PAPRUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PAPRUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
isEqual.isLessThan: SELECT DOCID , PROCESSORID , RECEIVEDDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_PDEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PAPRUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PAPRUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

isGreaterEqual.isGreaterEqual:
SELECT DOCID , PROCESSORID , RECEIVEDDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID#
AND PROCESSORID = #v_PAPRUSERID#
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PAPRUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PAPRUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
isGreaterEqual.isLessThan: SELECT DOCID , PROCESSORID , RECEIVEDDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID# AND (RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_PDEPTID# OR RECEIVEDDEPTID = (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PDEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PAPRUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PAPRUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OPINIONGB = '000'
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT OWNERID || '@' || SN AS DOCID, TBL_TMPAPROPINIONINFO.* FROM TBL_TMPAPROPINIONINFO) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY
USERNAME ASC DESC,
CONTENT ASC DESC,
USERJOBTITLE ASC DESC,
USERDEPTNAME ASC DESC,
OPINIONGB ASC DESC
OPINIONSN ASC DESC
OPINIONSN DESC

SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.* , CASE WHEN O.FORMID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OFFICEFLAG FROM TBL_FORMINFO INNER JOIN TBL_FORMUSERINFO ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_FORM_OFFICE O ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID = O.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = O.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = O.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_FORMUSERINFO.USERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID IN (SELECT TO_CHAR(FORMCONTID) FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND FORMCONTUSERDEPID = #deptId# UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(FORMCONTID) FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TO_CHAR(COMPANYID) = TO_CHAR(TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID) AND (FORMCONTOWNDEPID = 'ALL' or FORMCONTOWNDEPID = #deptId#) )
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.*, CASE WHEN O.FORMID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OFFICEFLAG FROM TBL_FORMINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID = TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.FORMCONTID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER ON TO_CHAR(TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID) = TO_CHAR(TBL_FORMCONTAINER.FORMCONTID) AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMCONTAINER.TENANT_ID AND TO_CHAR(TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID) = TO_CHAR(TBL_FORMCONTAINER.COMPANYID) LEFT JOIN TBL_FORM_OFFICE O ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID = O.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = O.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = O.COMPANYID WHERE (1=1) AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND ( FORMCONTOWNDEPID = 'ALL' OR FORMCONTUSERDEPID = ( SELECT DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN=#v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#))
SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.* , CASE WHEN O.FORMID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OFFICEFLAG FROM TBL_FORMINFO LEFT JOIN TBL_FORM_OFFICE O ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID = O.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = O.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = O.COMPANYID
WHERE TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID#
WHERE TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
WHERE TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY FORMORDER
LIMIT 0, 5

SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , NVL(FORMCONTNAME2, FORMCONTNAME) FORMCONTNAME2 , FORMCONTOWNDEPID , FORMCONTPARENTS , FORMCONTDESCRIPTION , SN FROM TBL_FormContainer WHERE FORMCONTPARENTS = #v_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , NVL(FORMCONTNAME2, FORMCONTNAME) FORMCONTNAME2 , FORMCONTOWNDEPID , FORMCONTPARENTS , FORMCONTDESCRIPTION , SN FROM TBL_FormContainer WHERE FORMCONTPARENTS = #v_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT DISTINCT TBL_FormContainer.FormContID , TBL_FormContainer.FormContName , NVL(TBL_FormContainer.FormContName2, TBL_FormContainer.FormContName) FORMCONTNAME2 , TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID , TBL_FormContainer.FormContParents , TBL_FormContainer.FormContdescription , TBL_FORMCONTAINER.SN FROM TBL_FormContainer LEFT JOIN TBL_FormContUserGroup ON TBL_FormContainer.FormContID = TBL_FormContUserGroup.FormContID AND TBL_FormContainer.TENANT_ID= TBL_FormContUserGroup.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FormContainer.COMPANYID = TBL_FormContUserGroup.COMPANYID WHERE ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContParents = #v_ID# ) AND ( ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' ) OR ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = #v_DEPTID# ) OR ( TBL_FormContUserGroup.FormContUserDepID = #v_DEPTID# ) ) AND TBL_FormContainer.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_FormContainer.COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY CASE WHEN TBL_FORMCONTAINER.SN IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, TBL_FORMCONTAINER.SN, TBL_FORMCONTAINER.FORMCONTID

SELECT CODE2,
NAME AS NAME
CASE #v_LANGTYPE# WHEN '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN '4' THEN NAME4 END AS NAME
FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE
CODE1 = 'A51'
CODE1 = 'SA51'
AND ISUSE = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY CODE2

SELECT CODE2,
NAME
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN '4' THEN NAME4 END AS NAME
FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ISUSE = '1'
CODE1 = 'A03'
CODE1 = 'SA03'
ORDER BY CODE2
SELECT APRLINESN , APRTEMPLETNAME FROM TBL_LINTEMPLET WHERE TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRLINESN
SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND MAINID = #v_MAINID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT APRLINESN , APRTEMPLETNAME FROM TBL_LINTEMPLET WHERE TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRLINESN

SELECT A.*, CASE WHEN B.CN IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS RETIRECHK FROM TBL_LINTEMPLETDETAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE B ON A.APRMEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE TRIM(A.FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND A.USERID = #v_USERID# AND A.APRLINESN = #v_APRLINESN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN
SELECT * FROM TBL_FormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT formId, formFileLocation FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyId = #companyId# AND formId = #formId#

select.isEqual: SELECT DEPTID, deptname, DEPTSN , USERID AS RECEIPTMEMBERID FROM TBL_FormRecv WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY DEPTSN DESC

SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , DEPTMEMBERSN FROM TBL_LASTDEPTLINE WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY DEPTMEMBERSN DESC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT APRMEMBERSN APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERNAME2 , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , APRMEMBERDEPTID , MEMBERDEPTNAME APRMEMBERDEPTNAME , MEMBERDEPTNAME2 APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , #companyID# APRMEMBERLDAPPATH , NULL RECEIVEDDATE , NULL PROCESSDATE , NULL REASONDONOTAPPROV , 'N' ISPROPOSERYN , 'N' ISBRIEFUSERYN, B.CN FROM TBL_LINTEMPLETDETAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE B ON A.APRMEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON A.APRMEMBERID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID
WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND APRLINESN = #v_APRLINESN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND B.CN IS NULL
AND (TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN IS NULL OR TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 = 'Y')
ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT A.USERID, A.FORMID, A.APRDEPTSN, A.APRDEPTTEMPLETNAME, B.EXTRECEPTYN FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLET A JOIN TBL_DEPTTEMPLETDETAIL B ON A.USERID = B.USERID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID AND A.APRDEPTSN = B.APRDEPTSN WHERE A.FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND A.USERID = #v_USERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY A.USERID, A.FORMID, A.APRDEPTSN, A.APRDEPTTEMPLETNAME, B.EXTRECEPTYN ORDER BY A.APRDEPTSN

SELECT A.*, D.DEPT_CD_PATH, CASE WHEN B.CN IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS RETIRECHK FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLETDETAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON A.APRMEMBERDEPTID = D.CN AND A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME = D.DISPLAYNAME AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE B ON A.APRMEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE TRIM(A.FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND A.USERID = #v_USERID# AND A.APRDEPTSN = #v_APRDEPTSN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.APRDEPTMEMBERSN

select.isEqual: SELECT A.MAINID, A.MAINNAME, B.EXTRECEPTYN FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN A JOIN TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB B ON A.MAINID = B.MAINID WHERE B.EXTRECEPTYN = #v_EXTRECEPTYN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY A.MAINID, A.MAINNAME, B.EXTRECEPTYN ORDER BY A.MAINID

SELECT A.*, B.DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB A LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.MAINID = #v_MAINID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.SUBID

SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.MAINID , TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.MAINNAME FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN JOIN TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB ON TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.MAINID = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.MAINID AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.TENANT_ID = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.COMPANYID = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.MAINID

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY MAINID

sqlMap.select:
SELECT APRDEPTMEMBERSN DEPTMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERDEPTID RECEIPTPOINTID , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME RECEIPTPOINTNAME , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSYN , '1' PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , APRMEMBERID RECEIPTMEMBERID , APRMEMBERNAME RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERNAME2 RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , NULL PROCESSDATE, D.DEPT_CD_PATH, B.CN FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLETDETAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON A.APRMEMBERDEPTID = D.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE B ON A.APRMEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.USERID = #v_USERID# AND A.FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND A.APRDEPTSN = #v_APRDEPTSN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND (D.DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash_dept_%' OR D.DEPT_CD_PATH IS NULL) AND B.CN IS NULL
AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 = 'Y'
ORDER BY APRDEPTMEMBERSN DESC

select.isEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT CATEGORYCODE , CNAME , CNAME2 FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OLDFLAG_TOP IS NULL ORDER BY CATEGORYCODE
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT B.CATEGORYCODE, CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN B.CNAME ELSE B.CNAME2 END AS NAME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VTASKCLASS A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.CATEGORYCODE = B.CATEGORYCODE AND A.MCATEGORYCODE != B.CATEGORYCODE AND A.OLDFLAG_MID IS NULL) as ISLEAF FROM VTASKCLASS B WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND B.OLDFLAG_TOP IS NULL ORDER BY CATEGORYCODE

select.isEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT MCATEGORYCODE , MCNAME , MCNAME2 FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND CATEGORYCODE = #v_CATECODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OLDFLAG_MID IS NULL ORDER BY MCATEGORYCODE
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT B.MCATEGORYCODE CATEGORYCODE, CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN B.MCNAME ELSE B.MCNAME2 END AS NAME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.MCATEGORYCODE = B.MCATEGORYCODE AND A.SUBCATEGORYCODE != B.MCATEGORYCODE AND A.OLDFLAG IS NULL) as ISLEAF FROM VTASKCLASS B WHERE B.CATEGORYCODE = #categoryCode# AND B.MCATEGORYCODE != #categoryCode# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND B.OLDFLAG_MID IS NULL ORDER BY MCATEGORYCODE

isEmpty.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT SUBCATEGORYCODE , SCNAME FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND MCATEGORYCODE = #v_CATECODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OLDFLAG_SUB IS NULL ORDER BY SUBCATEGORYCODE
isEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT SUBCATEGORYCODE , NVL(SCNAME, SCNAME2) SCNAME FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND MCATEGORYCODE = #v_CATECODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OLDFLAG_SUB IS NULL ORDER BY SUBCATEGORYCODE

select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT SUBCATEGORYCODE CATEGORYCODE, CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN SCNAME ELSE SCNAME2 END AS NAME, 0 as ISLEAF FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE MCATEGORYCODE = #categoryCode# AND SUBCATEGORYCODE != #categoryCode# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OLDFLAG_SUB IS NULL ORDER BY SUBCATEGORYCODE

sqlMap.select:
select * from (
SELECT VTASKCLASS.TASKCODE, TBL_CABINET.CABINETID, TBL_CABINET.REGSERIALNO, TBL_CABINET.PRODUCTIONYEAR, TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO, TBL_CABINET.MODIFYFLAG, TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, TBL_CABINET.CONFIRMFLAG, VTASKCLASS.TASKNAME, VTASKCLASS.TASKNAME2, TBL_CABINET.PROCESSDEPTCODE, TBL_CABINET.PROCESSDEPTNAME, TBL_CABINET.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO, TBL_CABINET.RECTYPECODE, TBL_CABINET.CLASSCREATEDATE, TBL_CABINET.OWNERID, NVL(TBL_CABINET.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, VTASKCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG) SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBL_CABINET.TERMINATEFLAG, TBL_CABINET.OWNERDEPTID, TBL_CABINET.OWNERTASK, TBL_CABINET.TRANSDELAYFLAG, TBL_CABINET.TITLE, TBL_CABINET.TITLE2, NVL(TBL_CABINET.KEEPINGPERIOD, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD) KEEPINGPERIOD, VTASKCLASS.DISPLAYRECFLAG, VTASKCLASS.DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, VTASKCLASS.SC1, VTASKCLASS.SC2, VTASKCLASS.SC3, VTASKCLASS.TEMPFLAG, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGMETHOD, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPLACE, VTASKCLASS.SCNAME, VTASKCLASS.SCNAME2, VTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TASKCODE, TASKNAME, NVL(TASKNAME2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME2, KEEPINGPERIOD, DISPLAYRECFLAG, DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, SC1, SC2, SC3, TEMPFLAG, KEEPINGMETHOD, KEEPINGPLACE, SCNAME, SCNAME2, SUBCATEGORYCODE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE 1=1
AND MCATEGORYCODE = #cateCode#
AND (TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #deptCode# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) VTASKCLASS LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKCODE, TBL_CABINET.CABINETID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.REGSERIALNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR, TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.MODIFYFLAG, TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CONFIRMFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME2, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RECTYPECODE AS RECTYPECODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CREATEDATE AS CLASSCREATEDATE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TERMINATEFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TRANSDELAYFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE2, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DELFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DELFLAG = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0') AND TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID) = #deptCode# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.EXPIRATIONYEAR >= #accountYear# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR <= #accountYear#
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2' AND TERMINATEFLAG = '0' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETID IN ( SELECT CABINETID FROM (SELECT CABINETCLASSNO, MAX(VOLUMENO) AS VOLUMENO, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DELFLAG = '0' GROUP BY CABINETCLASSNO,TENANT_ID,COMPANYID) TBMAXVOL INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBMAXVOL.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBMAXVOL.VOLUMENO = TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO AND TBMAXVOL.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBMAXVOL.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2'
) TBL_CABINET ON VTASKCLASS.TASKCODE = TBL_CABINET.TASKCODE AND VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND VTASKCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID ORDER BY TBL_CABINET.TASKNAME, TBL_CABINET.TITLE, TBL_CABINET.CLASSCREATEDATE DESC
) A where VOLUMENO is not null

SELECT DISTINCT TASKCODE , TASKNAME , NVL(TASKNAME2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME2 , KEEPINGPERIOD , DISPLAYRECFLAG , DISPLAYRECTRASTIME , SPECIALCATALOGFLAG , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 , TEMPFLAG , KEEPINGMETHOD , KEEPINGPLACE FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE SUBCATEGORYCODE = #v_SUBCATECODE# AND ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TASKNAME ASC

SELECT TBL_CABINET.CABINETID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.REGSERIALNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR, TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.MODIFYFLAG, TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CONFIRMFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME2, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RECTYPECODE AS RECTYPECODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CREATEDATE AS CLASSCREATEDATE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TERMINATEFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TRANSDELAYFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE2 FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DELFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DELFLAG = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0')
AND TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID) = #v_PDEPTCODE#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR = #v_PYEAR#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.EXPIRATIONYEAR >= #v_PACCOUNTPYEAR#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK = #v_TASKCODE#
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2' AND TERMINATEFLAG = '0' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETID IN (SELECT CABINETID FROM ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO, MAX(VOLUMENO) VOLUMENO, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY CABINETCLASSNO,TENANT_ID,COMPANYID ) TBMAXVOL INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBMAXVOL.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBMAXVOL.VOLUMENO = TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO AND TBMAXVOL.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBMAXVOL.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID )
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_CABINET.CREATEDATE DESC, TBL_CABINET.CABINETID DESC

select.isEmpty:
SELECT DISTINCT TASKCODE, TASKNAME, TASKNAME2, KEEPINGPERIOD, DISPLAYRECFLAG, DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, SC1, SC2, SC3, TEMPFLAG, KEEPINGMETHOD, KEEPINGPLACE, PROCESSDEPTCODE, PROCESSDEPTNAME, NVL(PROCESSDEPTNAME2,PROCESSDEPTNAME) AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, CATEGORYCODE, CNAME, CNAME2, MCATEGORYCODE, MCNAME, MCNAME2, SUBCATEGORYCODE, SCNAME, SCNAME2 FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE TENANT_ID = #col_where_TENANTID#
(PROCESSDEPTCODE = #col_where_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999')
CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN TASKNAME ELSE TASKNAME2 END LIKE '%' || #col_where_TASKNAME# || '%'
TASKCODE LIKE '%' || #col_where_TASKCODE# || '%'
COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY TASKCODE
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT TASKCODE, KEEPINGPERIOD, TEMPFLAG, DISPLAYRECFLAG, KEEPINGMETHOD, KEEPINGPLACE, TASKNAME, TASKNAME2, B.SUBCATEGORYCODE, CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN C.NAME ELSE C.NAME2 END AS NAME, ITEMSECURITY, ISPUBLIC, (SELECT CONCAT(CABINETCLASSNO, '001') FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TASKCODE = B.TASKCODE ) CABINETID FROM TBL_TASKCODE B JOIN TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY C ON B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND B.SUBCATEGORYCODE = C.SUBCATEGORYCODE WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DELFLAG = '0'
CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN C.NAME ELSE C.NAME2 END LIKE '%' || #task# || '%'
CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN TASKNAME ELSE TASKNAME2 END LIKE '%' || #task# || '%'
ORDER BY TASKCODE

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY
ATTACHUSERNAME ASC DESC,
DISPLAYNAME ASC DESC,
ATTACHFILESIZE ASC DESC,
PAGENUM ASC DESC,
NVL(VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILESN) ASC DESC
NVL(VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILESN) ASC

SELECT ATTACHFILENAME , DISPLAYNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE , PAGENUM FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT SN, NAME, WIDTH, TABLENAME, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SN ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT SN, CASE #v_LANGTYPE# WHEN '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN '4' THEN NAME4 END AS NAME, WIDTH, TABLENAME, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SN ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE, COLNAME || ' AS ' || COLALIAS AS SELECTFIELD FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SN ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CASE #v_LANGTYPE# WHEN '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN '4' THEN NAME4 END AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE, COLNAME || ' AS ' || COLALIAS AS SELECTFIELD FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SN ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_RECORD.SpecialRecordCode , TBL_RECORD.PublicityCode , TBL_RECORD.LimitRange , TBL_RECORD.PublicityYn , TBSEPATT.CatalogTransferFlag , TBSEPATT.CatalogTransferYear , TBSEPATT.DocTransferFlag , TBSEPATT.DocTransferYear , TBCAB.CabinetID , TBCAB.VolumeNo , TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptCode CABDEPTCODE , TBCABCLS.Title CABTITLE , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName CABDEPTNAME , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName2 CABDEPTNAME2 , TBCABCLS.TaskCode , TBCABCLS.TaskName , TBCABCLS.TaskName2 , TBCABCLS.ProductionYear , TBCABCLS.RegSerialNo , TBCABCLS.ConfirmFlag FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBSEPATT.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_CABINET TBCAB ON TBSEPATT.CabinetID = TBCAB.CabinetID AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBCAB.TENANT_ID AND TBSEPATT.COMPANYID = TBCAB.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_CABINETCLASS TBCABCLS ON TBCAB.CabinetClassNo = TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo AND TBCAB.TENANT_ID = TBCABCLS.TENANT_ID AND TBCAB.COMPANYID = TBCABCLS.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_RECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT B.*, (SELECT APRMEMBERID FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = B.DOCID AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS ORGUSERID FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY
REGISTERTYPE ASC DESC
REGISTERDATE ASC DESC
DISPREGISTERNO ASC DESC
SEPERATEATTACHNO ASC DESC
RECTITLE ASC DESC
DISPCLASSNO ASC DESC
APRMEMBERTITLE ASC DESC
DRAFTERNAME ASC DESC
RECEIPTNAME ASC DESC
ATTACHFLAG ASC DESC
REJECTFLAG ASC DESC
RESENDFLAG ASC DESC
WRITERDEPTNAME ASC DESC
FORMNAME ASC DESC
ISPUBLIC ASC DESC
TITLE ASC DESC
SIHANGNO ASC DESC
CREATEDATE DESC, RECORDID DESC, SEPERATEATTACHNO DESC
) AS ROWNUM_, N.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_RECORD.RecordID, TBL_RECORD.DocID, TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo, to_char(TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CreateDate + #offsetMin#/(24*60), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') as CreateDate, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocType, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RegisterType, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.Href, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ContainerID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FormID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WriterID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag, TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode AS CabDeptCode, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerDeptID, to_char(TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate + #offsetMin#/(24*60),'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') as RegisterDate, CASE WHEN #multiLang# IS NULL OR #multiLang# = '' THEN TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle ELSE TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle2 END AS AprMemberTitle, CASE WHEN #multiLang# IS NULL OR #multiLang# = '' THEN TBL_RECORD.DrafterName ELSE TBL_RECORD.DrafterName2 END AS DrafterName, TBL_RECORD.AttachFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerTask, TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.PUBLICITYYN, CASE WHEN #multiLang# IS NULL OR #multiLang# = '' THEN TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName ELSE TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName2 END AS ReceiptName, TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode RECDEPTCODE, TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName RECDEPTNAME, SUBSTR(TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo, -6) RECREGSN, TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID, TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE, ENDDOCNO.DOCNO SIHANGNO, CASE WHEN #multiLang# IS NULL OR #multiLang# = '' THEN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WriterDeptName ELSE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WriterDeptName2 END AS WriterDeptName, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC
, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityApproval , TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME
CONCAT(CONCAT(TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName, '-'), SUBSTR(TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo, -6)) AS DispRegisterNo
CONCAT(CONCAT(TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName, '-'), TRIM(LEADING'0' FROM TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo)) AS DispRegisterNo
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title AS RecTitle
CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode),'-'),TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode),'-'),ProductionYear),'-'),TRIM(LEADING'0' FROM RegSerialNo)),'('),TRIM(LEADING'0' FROM VolumeNo)),')') AS DispClassNo
CASE WHEN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocType = '003' AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RegisterType = '1' THEN '발송' ELSE '없음' END AS ReSendFlag
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage AS NumOfPage
TBL_RECORD.RegisterYear AS RegisterYear
Case TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag When '1' Then Year(TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate)||1 Else TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear End AS TransYear
Case TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag When '1' Then TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayReason Else TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayReason End AS DisplayReason
FROM TBL_RECORD Inner Join TBL_SEPERATEATTACH On TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID Left Join TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO On TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
Left Join TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO On TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINET.CABINETID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CABINETID AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CABINETCLASS ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID
JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID
LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_RECORD.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ENDDOCNO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID = ENDDOCNO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_RECORD.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = ENDDOCNO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = ENDDOCNO.COMPANYID
Left Join TBL_RECROLEINFO R On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.RECORDID = R.RECORDID
Inner Join TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID = TBL_RECORD.DOCID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID IS NOT NULL
WHERE 1 = 1
AND TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' And TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0')
AND
TRIM(OwnerDeptID) = #tempDeptCode#
TRIM(OwnerDeptID) = #upperDeptCode#
AND TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN
#cabinetIDArr[]#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4)
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear Between (SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) - '1') AND SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < CAST(SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) ) ) AND CatalogTransferFlag = '0'
AND TRIM(OwnerDeptID) = #tempDeptCode# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate >= CAST(SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear > SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) ) AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear > (SELECT Max(DocTransferYear) FROM TBL_CABINET A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#) ) )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo IN ( Select CabinetClassNo From TBL_CABROLEINFO A Where A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.User_ID IN
#chargerArr[]#
AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#)
AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND RTRIM(DISPLAYENDDATE) <> '' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < #transExpire# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) ) ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND DocTransferFlag='0'
TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #cabTitle#), '%')
TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate >= TO_DATE(#regStartDate#, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate <= TO_DATE(#regEndDate#, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_RECORD.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.DelFlag = '0'
CatalogTransferFlag = '1' AND ( DocTransferFlag = '0' OR DocTransferFlag IS NULL ) AND TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND SeperateAttachNo = '00'
DocTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferYear = ( SELECT MAX(DocTransferYear) FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# )
TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND ( SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) - TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear ) > TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPeriod
DocTransferFlag = '1'
( TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerDeptID) = #deptCode# AND SeperateAttachNo = '00')
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '011' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '2') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID != #relayFormID#
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '014' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '1') AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'N'
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '011' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '2') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = #relayFormID#
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '014' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '1') AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE = '001' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #userID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo = '00' AND TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag = '0'
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('N','T')
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'O'
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN NOT IN ('N', 'O', 'B', 'T')
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'B'
TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode = #recDeptCode#
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RegisterType = #regType#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = #formID#
ENDDOCNO.DOCNO Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #orgDocNum#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafterDept#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #docNum#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
TBL_RECORD.RecordID IN (SELECT RecordID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC A Where A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ( SC1 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') OR SC2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') OR SC3 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') ) )
( TBL_RECORD.DrafterName Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafter#), '%') OR TBL_RECORD.DrafterName2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafter#), '%') )
(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL )
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL )
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE = '001' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #userID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #deptCode# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = '00'
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND R.USERID = #userID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = '00'
) N ) A ) B
) N ) A WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #start# ) B WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #end#
) N ) A WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #start# ) B WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #end#
) N ) A WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #start# ) B WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #end#
SELECT CODETYPE , CODE , NAME , NAME2 FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT * FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY
ATTACHDOCNAME ASC DESC,
ATTACHSN ASC DESC
ATTACHSN ASC

isNotEqual.isEqual:
SELECT * FORMID, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, HREF, DOCTITLE, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, SECURITYCODE, STORAGEPERIOD, URGENTAPPROVAL, SECURITYAPPROVAL, SPECIALRECORDCODE, PUBLICITYCODE, LIMITRANGE, PAGENUM, TASKCODE, ITEMNAME, SUMMARY, PUBLICITYYN, KEYWORD,
'' AS "FOR_DYNAMIC_COLUMN" FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT * FORMID, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, HREF, DOCTITLE, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, SECURITYCODE, STORAGEPERIOD, URGENTAPPROVAL, SECURITYAPPROVAL, SPECIALRECORDCODE, PUBLICITYCODE, LIMITRANGE, PAGENUM, TASKCODE, ITEMNAME, SUMMARY, PUBLICITYYN, KEYWORD, '' AS "FOR_DYNAMIC_COLUMN" FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FORMID, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, HREF, DOCTITLE, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, SIGNCHECK, SECURITYCODE, STORAGEPERIOD, URGENTAPPROVAL, SECURITYAPPROVAL, SPECIALRECORDCODE, PUBLICITYCODE, LIMITRANGE, PAGENUM, TASKCODE, DELFLAG, ITEMNAME, SUMMARY, PUBLICITYYN, KEYWORD, '' AS "FOR_DYNAMIC_COLUMN" FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FORMID, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, HREF, DOCTITLE, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, SIGNCHECK, SECURITYCODE, STORAGEPERIOD, URGENTAPPROVAL, SECURITYAPPROVAL, SPECIALRECORDCODE, PUBLICITYCODE, LIMITRANGE, PAGENUM, TASKCODE, DELFLAG, ITEMNAME, SUMMARY, PUBLICITYYN, KEYWORD, '' AS "FOR_DYNAMIC_COLUMN" FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = #beforeDocID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCTITLE, FORMFILELOCATION, FORMDOCTYPE, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMVERSION, TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FormID = TBL_FORMINFO.FormID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEmpty:
SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINET.CabinetID , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerID , CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title ELSE TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title2 END AS Title, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD , VTASKCLASS.TEMPFLAG , VTASKCLASS.DISPLAYRECFLAG , VTASKCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG , VTASKCLASS.SC1 , VTASKCLASS.SC2 , VTASKCLASS.SC3 , VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGMETHOD , VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPLACE , CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN VTASKCLASS.TASKNAME ELSE VTASKCLASS.TASKNAME2 END AS TASKNAME, CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN VTASKCLASS.SCName ELSE VTASKCLASS.SCName2 END AS SCName, VTASKCLASS.SubCategoryCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.RecTypeCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.RegSerialNo , TBL_CABINET.VolumeNo FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_MYTASKCODE ON TBL_MYTASKCODE.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.CabinetID AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID JOIN VTASKCLASS ON VTASKCLASS.TaskCode = TBL_MYTASKCODE.TaskCode AND VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_MYTASKCODE.TENANT_ID AND VTASKCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_MYTASKCODE.COMPANYID
WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TERMINATEFLAG = '0' AND ((VTASKCLASS.CATEGORYCODE = VTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE AND VTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE = VTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE AND OLDFLAG_TOP IS NULL) OR (VTASKCLASS.CATEGORYCODE != VTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE AND VTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE = VTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE AND OLDFLAG_TOP IS NULL AND OLDFLAG_MID IS NULL) OR (VTASKCLASS.CATEGORYCODE != VTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE AND VTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE != VTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE AND OLDFLAG_TOP IS NULL AND OLDFLAG_MID IS NULL AND OLDFLAG_SUB IS NULL)) AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.CN = #v_USERID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.EXPIRATIONYEAR >= #v_ACCOUNTYEAR#
AND
TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID = #upperDeptCode#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINET.CabinetID , SVTASKCLASS.TaskCode , SVTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD , SVTASKCLASS.TEMPFLAG , SVTASKCLASS.KEEPINGMETHOD , SVTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPLACE , CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN SVTASKCLASS.TASKNAME ELSE SVTASKCLASS.TASKNAME2 END AS TASKNAME, CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN SVTASKCLASS.SCName ELSE SVTASKCLASS.SCName2 END AS SCName, SVTASKCLASS.SubCategoryCode , CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN SVTASKCLASS.MCName ELSE SVTASKCLASS.MCName2 END AS MCName, SVTASKCLASS.mCategoryCode , CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN SVTASKCLASS.CName ELSE SVTASKCLASS.CName2 END AS CName, SVTASKCLASS.CategoryCode , SVTASKCLASS.ISPUBLIC , SVTASKCLASS.ITEMSECURITY FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_MYTASKCODE ON TBL_MYTASKCODE.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.CabinetID AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID JOIN SVTASKCLASS ON SVTASKCLASS.TaskCode = TBL_MYTASKCODE.TaskCode AND SVTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_MYTASKCODE.TENANT_ID AND SVTASKCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_MYTASKCODE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND ((SVTASKCLASS.CATEGORYCODE = SVTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE AND SVTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE = SVTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE AND OLDFLAG_TOP IS NULL) OR (SVTASKCLASS.CATEGORYCODE != SVTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE AND SVTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE = SVTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE AND OLDFLAG_TOP IS NULL AND OLDFLAG_MID IS NULL) OR (SVTASKCLASS.CATEGORYCODE != SVTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE AND SVTASKCLASS.MCATEGORYCODE != SVTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE AND OLDFLAG_TOP IS NULL AND OLDFLAG_MID IS NULL AND OLDFLAG_SUB IS NULL)) AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.CN = #v_USERID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.DEPTID = #v_DEPTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo , VOLUMENO , TITLE , NVL(TITLE2, TITLE) TITLE2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , REGSERIALNO , PRODUCTIONYEAR , RECTYPECODE , TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag , TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate , TBL_CABINETCLASS.SpecialCatalogFlag , SCINFO.SC1 , SCINFO.SC2 , SCINFO.SC3 , CATEGORYCODE , MCATEGORYCODE , SUBCATEGORYCODE , CABINETTRANSFERFLAG , TCABINETID , TDEPTCODE FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB WHERE SERIALNO = '000' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) SCINFO ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = SCINFO.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = SCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = SCINFO.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID JOIN VTASKCLASS ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode = VTASKCLASS.TASKCODE AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = VTASKCLASS.COMPANYID WHERE TRIM(TBL_CABINET.CabinetID) = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT DOCID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CHANGEDATE ASC) AS CHANGESN, URL, CHANGEUSERID, CHANGEUSERJOBTITLE, CHANGEUSERJOBTITLE2, CHANGEUSERNAME, CHANGEUSERNAME2, CHANGEUSERDEPTID, CHANGEUSERDEPTNAME, CHANGEUSERDEPTNAME2, CHANGEDATE, CHKFLAG, EDITVERSION, NVL(BEFOREDOCURL, '') AS BEFOREDOCURL FROM TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND (ISBEFOREDOC = 'N' OR ISBEFOREDOC IS NULL OR TRIM(ISBEFOREDOC) = '') ORDER BY
CHANGESN ASC DESC,
CHANGEUSERNAME ASC DESC,
CHANGEUSERJOBTITLE ASC DESC,
CHANGEUSERDEPTNAME ASC DESC,
CHANGEDATE ASC DESC
CHANGEDATE ASC

SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYUSERID, MODIFYUSERNAME, MODIFYUSERNAME2, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE2, MODIFYUSERDEPTID, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME2, CHKFLAG FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY
MODIFYSN ASC DESC,
MODIFYUSERNAME ASC DESC,
MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE ASC DESC,
MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME ASC DESC,
MODIFYDATE ASC DESC
MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYUSERID, MODIFYUSERNAME, MODIFYUSERNAME2, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE2, MODIFYUSERDEPTID, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME2, CHKFLAG FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND MODIFYSN = #v_MODIFYSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
ORDER BY APRTYPE, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRSTATE, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY ISBRIEFUSERYN, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY ISPROPOSERYN, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRTYPE, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRSTATE, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT DISTINCT HIS.ATTACHUSERNAME as DISPLAYNAME, HIS.DOCID, HIS.ATTACHFILESN, HIS.ATTACHFILENAME, HIS.ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, HIS.ATTACHFILEHREF, HIS.ATTACHFILESIZE, HIS.ATTACHUSERID, HIS.ATTACHUSERNAME, HIS.ATTACHUSERNAME2, HIS.ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, HIS.ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, HIS.ATTACHUSERDEPTID, HIS.ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, HIS.ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, HIS.MODIFYDATE, HIS.MODIFYSN, HIS.MODIFYFLAG, HIS.PAGENUM, HIS.CHKFLAG FROM TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO HIS WHERE HIS.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND HIS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND HIS.COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY MODIFYDATE
ORDER BY MODIFYFLAG, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY ATTACHFILESIZE, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY ATTACHUSERNAME, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY PAGENUM, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY MODIFYDATE DESC

select.isEqual:
SELECT APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, PROCESSDATE, RECEIVEDDATE, APRMEMBERID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND
APRMEMBERID IN
#v_DEPTID2[]#
APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND (APRSTATE = '000' OR APRSTATE = '002') AND APRTYPE = '007'
AND ( APRSTATE = '002' OR APRSTATE = '005')
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, PROCESSDATE, RECEIVEDDATE, APRMEMBERID FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND
APRMEMBERID IN
#v_DEPTID2[]#
APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND (APRSTATE = '000' OR APRSTATE = '002') AND APRTYPE = '007'
AND ( APRSTATE = '002' OR APRSTATE = '005')
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERNAME2 , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRMEMBERLDAPPATH FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN > #v_APRMEMBERSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '001','004','016','018','019' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
select.isNotEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '008','009','011','012' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.DocType , A.DocState , A.OrgDocID , B.AprMemberID , B.AprMemberName , B.AprMemberName2 , B.AprMemberDeptID , B.AprMemberDeptName , B.AprMemberDeptName2 , C.companyID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A LEFT JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND B.AprMemberSN = '1' AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT DOCID, RECEIPTPOINTID, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, EXTRECEPTYN, PROCESSYN, PROCESSSN, CANEDITYN, EXTRECEPTEMAIL, RECEIPTMEMBERID, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, PROCESSDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE, DEPTMEMBERSN, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, ROUTEYN, COMPANYID FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSSN = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY DEPTMEMBERSN

SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , EXTRECEPTEMAIL FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSSN = 1 AND EXTRECEPTYN = 'N' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT ORGDOCID , DOCSTATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID= #companyID#
SELECT ORGDOCID , DOCSTATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID= #companyID#
SELECT DEPTID , DEPTNAME , DEPTNAME2 , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND MAINID = #v_MAINID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCSTATE , HREF , APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO LEFT JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN = 1 AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , NVL(A.WriterDeptName2, A.WriterDeptName) WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WriterName , NVL(A.WriterName2, A.WriterName) WRITERNAME2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , C.AprMemberJobTitle , NVL(C.AprMemberJobTitle2, C.AprMemberJobTitle) APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , C.AprMemberName , C.AprMemberName2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode, B.PublicityYn FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND C.AprType IN ( '001','004','016' ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY C.AprMemberSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode , C.sn, B.PublicityYn FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_DOCDELIVERY C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM( SELECT TBL_APROPINIONINFO.* FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TBL_APROPINIONINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APROPINIONINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APROPINIONINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_APROPINIONINFO.OPINIONSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SIGNTYPE , SIGNNAME , CONTENT FROM TBL_SIGNINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND SIGNNAME LIKE 'sign%' ORDER BY SIGNNAME DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRTYPE, APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '012','011','009','008' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ExtReceptYN = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT SUM(AttachFileSize) TOTALSIZE , CASE WHEN SUM(AttachFileSize) > 20000000 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FLAG FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 0 TOTALSIZE , 'N' FLAG FROM DUAL

sqlMap.select: SELECT RECORDID , SEPERATEATTACHNO , USERID , USERRIGHT , USERNAME , USERNAME2 , USERTITLE , USERTITLE2 , DEPTCODE , DEPTNAME , DEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND USERRIGHT = 1 AND USERID <> 'All_User' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DOCID , SERIALNO , USERID , USERNAME , USERNAME2 , USERTITLE , (CASE WHEN USERTITLE2 IS NULL THEN USERTITLE ELSE USERTITLE2 END) USERTITLE2 , DEPTCODE , DEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN DEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN DEPTNAME ELSE DEPTNAME2 END) DEPTNAME2 , READDATE FROM TBL_RECREADHISTORY WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY READDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND MODIFYSN = #v_MODIFYSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DOCSTATE , DOCTYPE , ORGDOCID , HREF FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCSTATE , DOCTYPE , ORGDOCID , HREF FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#)
WHERE 1 = 1
AND DOCSTATE = #v_CHAMSTATE#
AND DOCSTATE != '017'
AND ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT A.aprsn AS aprSN, A.signtype AS signType, A.signname AS signName, A.content AS content, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN B.aprmembername WHEN '2' THEN B.aprmembername2 END AS aprmemberName FROM TBL_SIGNINFO A JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.docid = B.docid AND A.aprsn = B.aprmembersn WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.docid = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN >= ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '003' AND APRTYPE != '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1) ) AND ( DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRTYPE != '007' ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 2
