SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN >= ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '003' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) ) AND ( DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
SELECT href, doctitle FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT 'DOC' TYPE , DocTitle FILENAME , Href FILEPATH , 1 AS TYPESN, 1 AS VIEWSN, 1 AS ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATT' TYPE , DISPLAYNAME FILENAME , AttachFileHref FILEPATH , 2 AS TYPESN, NVL(VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILESN) AS VIEWSN, ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATTDOC' TYPE , AttachDocName FILENAME , AttachDocURL FILEPATH , 3 AS TYPESN, ATTACHSN AS VIEWSN, 1 AS ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT 'DOC' TYPE , DocTitle FILENAME , Href FILEPATH , 1 AS TYPESN, 1 AS VIEWSN, 1 AS ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATT' TYPE , DISPLAYNAME FILENAME , AttachFileHref FILEPATH , 2 AS TYPESN, NVL(VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILESN) AS VIEWSN, ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATTDOC' TYPE , AttachDocName FILENAME , AttachDocURL FILEPATH , 3 AS TYPESN, ATTACHSN AS VIEWSN, 1 AS ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT TYPE, FILENAME, FILEPATH FROM ( SELECT 'DOC' TYPE, DOCTITLE FILENAME, HREF FILEPATH, CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), TO_CHAR(SN)) AS DOCID, 1 AS TYPESN, 1 AS VIEWSN, 1 AS ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATT' TYPE, DISPLAYNAME FILENAME, ATTACHFILEHREF FILEPATH, CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), TO_CHAR(SN)) AS DOCID, 2 AS TYPESN, NVL(VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILESN) AS VIEWSN, ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_TMPATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATTDOC' TYPE, ATTACHDOCNAME FILENAME, ATTACHDOCURL FILEPATH, CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), TO_CHAR(SN)) AS DOCID, 3 AS TYPESN, ATTACHSN AS VIEWSN, 1 AS ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID#
ORDER BY TYPESN ASC, VIEWSN ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM (
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVESN, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.SEPERATEATTACHXML, TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM (SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVESN, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL, CASE WHEN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.SEPERATEATTACHXML IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN TO_CHAR(TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.SEPERATEATTACHXML) = '' THEN 'N' WHEN TO_CHAR(TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.SEPERATEATTACHXML) = ' ' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS SEPERATEATTACHXML, TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND (((TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011')) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014', '015') AND PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# )
OR ((TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '013') OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012')
) AND ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID != #v_RELAYFORMID# OR ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '011' ) )
SELECT * FROM (SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVESN, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL, CASE WHEN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.SEPERATEATTACHXML IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN TO_CHAR(TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.SEPERATEATTACHXML) = '' THEN 'N' WHEN TO_CHAR(TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.SEPERATEATTACHXML) = ' ' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS SEPERATEATTACHXML, TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID
, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORNAME as PROCESSORNAME
FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID WHERE
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y'
AND ((
(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#)
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#
AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011'
OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015'
)) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014', '015')
AND PROCESSORID IS NULL
)
OR ((TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTID# AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID IS NULL) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '013') OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# and TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
and TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012')
)
AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011'
AND ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID != #v_RELAYFORMID# OR ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '011' ) )
TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCNO LIKE '%' || #col_where_DOCNO# || '%'
TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #col_where_DOCTITLE# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERNAME# || '%'
TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERNAME2# || '%'
TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%'
TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERDEPTNAME2# || '%'
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#col_where_PROCESSDATE_START1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE <= TO_DATE(#col_where_PROCESSDATE_END1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #col_where_FORMID#
TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #col_where_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL = #col_where_URGENTAPPROVAL#
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#col_where_PROCESSDATE_START2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE <= TO_DATE(#col_where_PROCESSDATE_END2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_SENTDEPTNAME# || '%'
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME# || '%'
APRSTATE = #col_where_APRSTATE#
ORDER BY
DOCTITLE ASCDESC,
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE ASCDESC,
APRSTATE ASCDESC,
WRITERNAME ASCDESC,
SENTDEPTNAME ASCDESC,
RECEIVEDDEPTNAME ASCDESC,
PROCESSORNAME ASCDESC,
FORMNAME ASCDESC,
HASATTACHYN ASCDESC,
ISPUBLIC ASCDESC,
PROCESSDATE ASCDESC
PROCESSDATE ASCDESC
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#) A
ORDER BY
DOCTITLE ASCDESC,
A.DOCSTATE ASCDESC,
APRSTATE ASCDESC,
WRITERNAME ASCDESC,
SENTDEPTNAME ASCDESC,
RECEIVEDDEPTNAME ASCDESC,
PROCESSORNAME ASCDESC,
FORMNAME ASCDESC,
HASATTACHYN ASCDESC,
ISPUBLIC ASCDESC,
PROCESSDATE ASCDESC
PROCESSDATE ASCDESC
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE2#

SELECT B.Href OrgHref , A.Href Href FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.OrgDocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT aprmemberdeptid, aprmemberdeptname, aprmemberdeptname2 FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE docid = #v_DOCID# AND companyID = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.Href , TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocType , TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocState , TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.AprState , TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.ReceiveSN , ( SELECT TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#) RECEIVEDDEPTID , ( SELECT TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#) PROCESSORID , ( SELECT TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = ( SELECT TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#) ) RECEIVEDDEPTNAME , ( SELECT * FROM( SELECT SN FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE TBL_DOCDELIVERY.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_DOCDELIVERY.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_DOCDELIVERY.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_DOCDELIVERY.RECEIPTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1 ) SN FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO JOIN TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY PROCESSYN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.DOCID, ORGDOCID, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERSN, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, WRITERID, APRTYPE, HREF, STARTDATE, VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID, TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO.GROUPDOCSN FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO ON VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO.DOCID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO.TENANT_ID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO.COMPANYID
WHERE DOCSTATE <> '015'
AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND FUNCTIONTYPE IN ('002', '005', '000') AND APRMEMBERID IN
#v_USERIDS[]#
UNION
SELECT vendchamjodocinfo.DOCID, ORGDOCID, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERSN, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, WRITERID, APRTYPE, HREF, STARTDATE, vendchamjodocinfo.COMPANYID, TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO.GROUPDOCSN FROM vendchamjodocinfo LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO ON vendchamjodocinfo.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO.DOCID AND vendchamjodocinfo.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO.TENANT_ID AND vendchamjodocinfo.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO.COMPANYID
WHERE DOCSTATE <> '015'
AND vendchamjodocinfo.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND vendchamjodocinfo.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND FUNCTIONTYPE IN ('002') AND APRMEMBERID IN
#v_USERIDS[]#
) WHERE 1=1
AND STARTDATE < (SELECT
STARTDATE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCSTATE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FUNCTIONTYPE IN ('002', '005', '000', '004') AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION SELECT STARTDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE <> '015'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) AND GROUPDOCSN IS NULL ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC, DOCID DESC
AND STARTDATE > (SELECT STARTDATE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCSTATE <> '015'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FUNCTIONTYPE IN ('002', '005', '000', '004') AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION
SELECT STARTDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE <> '015'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) AND GROUPDOCSN IS NULL ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, DOCID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT CName, MCName, SCName, CABINETID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.REGSERIALNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR, TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.MODIFYFLAG, TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CONFIRMFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME2, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RECTYPECODE AS RECTYPECODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CREATEDATE AS CLASSCREATEDATE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TERMINATEFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TRANSDELAYFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE2, TBL_CABINET.CREATEDATE, VTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD, VTASKCLASS.TEMPFLAG, VTASKCLASS.DISPLAYRECFLAG, VTASKCLASS.SC1, VTASKCLASS.SC2, VTASKCLASS.SC3, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGMETHOD, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPLACE FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID INNER JOIN VTASKCLASS ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKCODE = VTASKCLASS.TaskCode AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = VTASKCLASS.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DELFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DELFLAG = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0') AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID) = #v_PDEPTCODE#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.EXPIRATIONYEAR >= #v_PYEAR#
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2' AND TERMINATEFLAG = '0' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETID IN ( SELECT CABINETID FROM ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO, MAX(VOLUMENO) AS VOLUMENO, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY CABINETCLASSNO,TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBMAXVOL INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBMAXVOL.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBMAXVOL.VOLUMENO = TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO AND TBMAXVOL.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBMAXVOL.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID)
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2'
AND CASE #v_LANGTYPE# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE2 ELSE TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE END LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%'
ORDER BY TBL_CABINET.CREATEDATE DESC, CABINETID DESC

SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID , TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID , TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID , TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME , TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT A.DocID , A.AprMemberSN , A.AprType , A.AprState , A.AprMemberID , A.AprMemberIsDeptYN , A.AprMemberName , A.AprMemberName2 , A.AprMemberJobTitle , A.AprMemberJobTitle2 , A.AprMemberDeptID , A.AprMemberDeptName , A.AprMemberDeptName2 , A.AprMemberLDAPPath , A.ReceivedDate , A.ProcessDate , A.isProposerYN , A.isBriefUserYN , A.ReasonDoNotApprov , B.orguserid , B.proxyuserid , B.proxyusername , B.proxyusername2 , B.proxyuserjobtitle , B.proxyuserjobtitle2 , B.proxyuserdeptid , B.proxyuserdeptname , B.proxyuserdeptname2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE B ON A.DocID = B.docid AND A.AprMemberSN = B.aprmemberSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.AprMemberID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.AprState <> '003' AND A.AprState <> '010'
AND A.AprType = #strType#
AND A.AprMemberSN = #v_APRMEMBERSN#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID#
UNION ALL
SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) ORDER BY A.AprMemberSN ASC

SELECT A.DocID , A.AprMemberSN , A.AprType , A.AprState , A.AprMemberID , A.AprMemberIsDeptYN , A.AprMemberName , A.AprMemberName2 , A.AprMemberJobTitle , A.AprMemberJobTitle2 , A.AprMemberDeptID , A.AprMemberDeptName , A.AprMemberDeptName2 , A.AprMemberLDAPPath , A.ReceivedDate , A.ProcessDate , A.isProposerYN , A.isBriefUserYN , B.orguserid , B.proxyuserid , B.proxyusername , B.proxyusername2 , B.proxyuserjobtitle , B.proxyuserjobtitle2 , B.proxyuserdeptid , B.proxyuserdeptname , B.proxyuserdeptname2 FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE B ON A.DocID = B.docid AND A.AprMemberSN = B.aprmemberSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.AprMemberID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.AprState <> '003' AND A.AprState <> '010' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID#
UNION ALL
SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) ORDER BY A.AprMemberSN ASC

UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID , 'END' FLAG FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) A WHERE DOCID IN ( SELECT ORGDOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ORGDOCID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT C.DocID , C.FLAG , ( SELECT DocID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO D WHERE D.OrgDocID = C.DOCID AND D.WriterDeptID = C.WRITERDEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# ) GDOCID FROM ( SELECT A.DOCID DOCID , 'END' FLAG , B.WRITERDEPTID FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.ReceivedDeptID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.DocState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND B.OrgDocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocID DocID , 'APR' FLAG , B.WriterDeptID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.ReceivedDeptID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.DocState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND B.OrgDocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY FLAG DESC, DOCID DESC ) D ORDER BY DOCID DESC ) C WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT row_number() over(ORDER BY NULL) as rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID,
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME,
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2 FORMNAME,
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, NVL(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL,'') AS SECURITYAPPROVAL, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
, PROCESSYN
, CASE WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '1' THEN C.NAME WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '2' THEN C.NAME2 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '3' THEN C.NAME3 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '4' THEN C.NAME4 END as DOCSTATENAME, CASE WHEN processYN = 'H' THEN #v_H# WHEN processYN = 'I' THEN #v_I# WHEN processYN = 'N' THEN #v_N# WHEN processYN = 'Y' THEN #v_Y# ELSE #v_Y# END AS SENDFLAG
, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 companyName
, TBL_DEPTMASTER.COMPNM2 companyName
FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST C ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = C.CODE2 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST D ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE = D.CODE2 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO E ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = E.DocID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID
WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND C.CODE1 ='SA02' AND D.CODE1 ='A04'
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_whereStr_pApprovUser#
DOCNO LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_MULTIDATALANG# WHEN '2' THEN WRITERNAME2 ELSE WRITERNAME END LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
CASE #v_MULTIDATALANG# WHEN '2' THEN WRITERDEPTNAME2 ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME END LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
FORMID = #v_FORMID#
(FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' OR FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE1#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE2#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE1#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE2#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PROCESSDATE1#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PROCESSDATE2#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL AND CONTAINERID NOT IN ( SELECT containerid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = '999' )
CONTAINERID IN
#v_CONTIDARR[]#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
#v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
( #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE OR ( SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(COUNT(DocID), 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RET FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND AprMemberID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
) = 'Y')
#v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME = #v_containerFormName# ESCAPE '\'
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TASKCODE = #v_containerTaskCode#
DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER# GROUP BY TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL
AND ( PROCESSYN <> 'H' AND PROCESSYN <> 'I' AND PROCESSYN <> 'N' OR PROCESSYN IS NULL)
PROCESSYN = #v_PROCESSYN#
ITEMCODE = #v_ITEMCODE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRTYPE = #v_EAPRTYPE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRSTATE = #v_ENDAPRSTATE#
ORDER BY
DOCNO DESC,
DOCTITLE DESC,
WRITERNAME DESC,
COMPANYNAME DESC,
WRITERDEPTNAME DESC,
FORMNAME DESC,
HASATTACHYN DESC,
ISPUBLIC DESC,
DOCSTATENAME DESC,
SENDFLAG DESC,
ENDDATE DESC
ENDDATE DESC
ENDDATE DESC, DOCNO DESC
) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#
) X WHERE X.rnum >= #v_PAGESIZE3# + 1
ORDER BY
DOCNO DESC,
DOCTITLE DESC,
WRITERNAME DESC,
COMPANYNAME DESC,
WRITERDEPTNAME DESC,
FORMNAME DESC,
HASATTACHYN DESC,
ISPUBLIC DESC,
DOCSTATENAME DESC,
SENDFLAG DESC,
ENDDATE DESC
ENDDATE
ENDDATE, DOCNO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT row_number() over(ORDER BY NULL) as rnum,
A.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, (CASE WHEN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL END) AS SECURITYAPPROVAL, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID) AS COMPANYNAME, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID) AS COMPANYNAME2, '' AS SN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
WHERE CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO LIKE '%' || #col_where_DOCNO# || '%'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #col_where_DOCTITLE# || '%'
(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERNAME# || '%' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERNAME# || '%')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#col_where_STARTDATE_START#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#col_where_STARTDATE_END#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#col_where_ENDDATE_START#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#col_where_ENDDATE_END#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STORAGEPERIOD = #col_where_STORAGEPERIOD#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY
COMPANYNAME ASCDESC,
DOCNO ASCDESC,
DOCTITLE ASCDESC,
FORMNAME ASCDESC,
HASATTACHYN ASCDESC,
ISPUBLIC ASCDESC,
WRITERDEPTNAME ASCDESC,
WRITERNAME ASCDESC,
ENDDATE ASCDESC
ENDDATE DESC
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#) A ) X WHERE X.rnum >= #v_PAGESIZE3#+1
ORDER BY
COMPANYNAME ASCDESC,
DOCNO ASCDESC,
DOCTITLE ASCDESC,
FORMNAME ASCDESC,
HASATTACHYN ASCDESC,
ISPUBLIC ASCDESC,
WRITERDEPTNAME ASCDESC,
WRITERNAME ASCDESC,
ENDDATE ASCDESC
ENDDATE ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
SELECT DOCTITLE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISPLAYNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE , 'file' AS ATTACHTYPECODE FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , NULL ATTACHFILESIZE , 'document' AS ATTACHTYPECODE FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '
SELECT DOCTITLE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISPLAYNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE , 'file' AS ATTACHTYPECODE FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , NULL ATTACHFILESIZE , 'document' AS ATTACHTYPECODE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '

SELECT DOCTITLE FROM ( SELECT (CAST(OWNERID AS VARCHAR2(200)) || '@' || CAST(SN AS VARCHAR2(200))) DOCID , DOCTITLE FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISPLAYNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE , 'file' AS ATTACHTYPECODE FROM ( SELECT (CAST(OWNERID AS VARCHAR2(200)) || '@' || CAST(SN AS VARCHAR2(200))) DOCID , DISPLAYNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE FROM TBL_TMPATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , TO_BINARY_FLOAT(NULL) ATTACHFILESIZE , 'document' AS ATTACHTYPECODE FROM ( SELECT (CAST(OWNERID AS VARCHAR2(200)) || '@' || CAST(SN AS VARCHAR2(200))) DOCID , ATTACHDOCNAME , ATTACHDOCURL FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '001' ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTNAME, TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('A','E','H','I','R','S','T','V','Y')
DOCNO LIKE '%' || #q_Map.qOptionDocNo# || '%'
DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle# || '%'
WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #q_Map.qOptionWriterName# || '%'
WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #q_Map.qOptionWriterName# || '%'
WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE '%' || #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName# || '%'
WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE '%' || #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName# || '%'
RECEIVEDDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionAprSReceivedDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionAprStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
RECEIVEDDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionAprEReceivedDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionAprEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = #q_Map.qOptionSearchStatus#
FORMID = #q_Map.qOptionFormId#
(FORMNAME LIKE ('%' || #q_Map.qOptionFormName# || '%') OR FORMNAME2 LIKE ('%' || #q_Map.qOptionFormName# || '%') ESCAPE '\')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #q_Map.qOptionKeyword# || '%'
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ITEMCODE = #q_Map.qOptionItemCode#
URGENTAPPROVAL = #q_Map.qOptionUrgentApproval#
ORDER BY
DOCTITLE DESC, WRITERDEPTNAME DESC, WRITERNAME DESC, PROCESSYN DESC, FORMNAME DESC,
ENDDATE DESC ENDDATE DESC
ENDDATE DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE# ) B
ORDER BY
DOCTITLE DESC, WRITERDEPTNAME DESC, WRITERNAME DESC, PROCESSYN DESC, FORMNAME DESC, ENDDATE DESC ENDDATE
ENDDATE
) C WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE2#

SELECT A.DocID , A.AprMemberSN , A.AprType , A.AprState , A.AprMemberID , A.AprMemberIsDeptYN , A.AprMemberName , A.AprMemberName2 , A.AprMemberJobTitle , A.AprMemberJobTitle2 , A.AprMemberDeptID , A.AprMemberDeptName , A.AprMemberDeptName2 , A.AprMemberLDAPPath , A.ReceivedDate , A.ProcessDate , A.isProposerYN , A.isBriefUserYN , A.ReasonDoNotApprov , B.orguserid , B.proxyuserid , B.proxyusername , B.proxyusername2 , B.proxyuserjobtitle , B.proxyuserjobtitle2 , B.proxyuserdeptid , B.proxyuserdeptname , B.proxyuserdeptname2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE B ON A.DocID = B.docid AND A.AprMemberSN = B.aprmemberSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.AprMemberID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.AprState = #v_PAPRSTATE#
AND A.AprMemberSN = #v_APRMEMBERSN#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.AprMemberSN DESC

SELECT WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WriterName2 , WRITERJOBTITLE , WriterJobTitle2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WriterDeptName2 , ORGDOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RECEIVESN , SENTDEPTID , SENTDEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN SENTDEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN SENTDEPTNAME ELSE SENTDEPTNAME2 END) AS SENTDEPTNAME2, RECEIVEDDEPTID , RECEIVEDDEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN RECEIVEDDEPTNAME ELSE RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 END) AS RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ORDER BY RECEIVESN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT ORGDOCNUMCODE , HREF FROM TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , '회송문서' APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , 'Return a document' APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode, B.PublicityYn FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ROWNUM <= 1
select.isEmpty: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , C.AprMemberJobTitle , C.AprMemberJobTitle2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode , B.PublicityYn FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND C.AprState IN ( '004' ) ORDER BY C.AprMemberSN DESC )

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.DocID , A.FormID , A.OrgDocID , A.DocType , A.DocState , A.FunctionType , A.Href , A.DocTitle , #v_PDOCNO# DocNo , A.HasAttachYN , A.HasOpinionYN , A.StartDate , A.EndDate , A.WriterID , A.WriterName , A.WriterJobTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , ' ' Html , ' ' pUserID , ' ' pUserName , WriterDeptID pDeptID , ' ' OrgHtml , SecurityCode security , StoragePeriod keepperiod , isPublic publication , WriterID proxyuserid , ItemCode , ItemName , UrgentApproval , KeyWord , ' ' Xdocid , B.SpecialRecordCode SPECIALRECORDCODE , B.PublicityCode PUBLICITYCODE , B.LimitRange LIMITRANGE , B.PageNum PAGENUM , B.CabinetID CABINETID , B.TaskCode TASKCODE , B.DocNumCode DOCNUMCODE , B.OrgDocNumCode ORGDOCNUMCODE , B.SeperateAttachXML SEPERATEATTACHXML , B.Summary SUMMARY , B.SecurityApproval SECURITYAPPROVAL , A.WriterName2 WRITERNAME2 , A.WriterJobTitle2 WRITERJOBTITLE2 , A.WriterDeptName2 WRITERDEPTNAME2 , ' ' PUSERNAME2 , b.ItemName2 ITEMNAME2 FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT code2, CASE WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '4' THEN NAME4 ELSE NAME END as name FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE code1 = 'SA01' AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND isuse = 1 ORDER BY code2

SELECT code2, CASE WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '4' THEN NAME4 ELSE NAME END as name FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE code1 = 'A01' AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND isuse = 1 ORDER BY code2
SELECT NAME FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND TRIM(CODE2) = #v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2
SELECT NAME FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND CODE2 = #v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '4' THEN NAME4 ELSE NAME END AS NAME FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND CODE2 = #v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2

select.isEqual: SELECT CODE2 FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND NAME = #v_NAME#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CODE2 FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND (CASE WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '4' THEN NAME4 ELSE NAME END) = #v_NAME#

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN A.PUBLICITYYN = 'Y' AND C.USERRIGHT = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE A.PUBLICITYYN END AS PUBLICITYYN FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_RECORD B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_RECROLEINFO C ON B.RECORDID = C.RECORDID AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE A.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.SEPERATEATTACHNO = '00' AND C.USERID = 'All_User'
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT PUBLICITYCODE FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(COUNT(DocID), 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RET FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND AprMemberID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT CONTAINEROWNDEPID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO JOIN TBL_CONTAINER ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID = TBL_CONTAINER.CONTAINERID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_CONTAINER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_CONTAINER.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT APRMEMBERID FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN = '1' ) AND ( APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# ) AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT SECURITYCODE FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserRight) FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_RECROLEINFO ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_RECROLEINFO.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECROLEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_RECROLEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE ( TBL_RECROLEINFO.SeperateAttachNo = '00' ) AND (( TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserRight = '1' ) OR (TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserID = 'All_User' AND TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserRight = '2')) AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.insert:
SELECT LASTDOCID + 1 FROM TBL_LASTDOCID WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# FOR UPDATE
UPDATE TBL_LastDocID SET lastDocID = #v_LASTDOCID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT max(lastDocID) lastDocID FROM TBL_LastDocID WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(NAME2, NAME) NAME FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CODETYPE = #v_CODETYPE# AND CODE = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT ATTACHFILEHREF FROM ( SELECT NVL(ATTACHFILEHREF, '') AS ATTACHFILEHREF, CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), TO_CHAR(SN)) AS DOCID FROM TBL_TMPATTACHINFO WHERE ATTACHFILESN = #docAttachSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#
