sqlMap.select: SELECT RECEIVESN FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCSTATE != '012'

SELECT TBL_Container.ContainerID ContainerID FROM TBL_Container JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBL_Container.ContainerTypeID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID AND TBL_Container.TENANT_ID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID AND TBL_Container.COMPANYID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_Container.ContainerOwnDepID = #v_DEPTID# AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND TBL_Container.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_Container.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT TBL_ContainerType.ContainerTypeID ContainerTypeID FROM TBL_ContainerType JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBL_ContainerType.ContainerTypeID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID AND TBL_ContainerType.TENANT_ID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ContainerType.COMPANYID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT #v_CONTAINERID# || ':' || #v_CONTAINERTYPEID# CONTAINERID FROM DUAL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_Container ( CONTAINERID, CONTAINERTYPEID, CONTAINEROWNDEPID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #v_MAXCONTAINERID#, #v_CONTAINERTYPE#, #v_DEPTID#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT SUBSTR('0000000000' || ((CASE WHEN MAX(CONTAINERID) IS NULL THEN '0000000000' ELSE MAX(CONTAINERID) END) + 1 ), -10, 10) FROM TBL_Container WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT SPECIALCATALOGFLAG FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT PROCESSDATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT RECEIPTMEMBERID FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN APRMEMBERNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN APRMEMBERNAME2 ELSE APRMEMBERNAME END APRMEMBERNAME FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '001','004' ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN APRMEMBERJOBTITLE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 ELSE APRMEMBERJOBTITLE END APRMEMBERJOBTITLE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '001','004' ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, PROCESSDATE, REASONDONOTAPPROV, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ('001', '004', '016') ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT HREF FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT ' ' HREF FROM DUAL

sqlMap.select: SELECT APRTYPE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_APRMEMBERID# AND (APRSTATE = #v_STAASJINHANG# OR APRSTATE = #v_STAASBORYU#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CONTENT FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ORDER BY OPINIONSN DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE ORGDOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND DOCSTATE = #v_docState# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN DOCID > 0 THEN ( SELECT AprState FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) ELSE ( SELECT AprState FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DOCID) DOCID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) )
SELECT MAX(VOLUMENO) + 1 NEWVOLNO FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TRIM(CABINETCLASSNO) = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT SENTDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT CASE WHEN FORMCONNFLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE FORMCONNFLAG END FORMCONNFLAG FROM TBL_FormInfo A JOIN ( SELECT FORMID ,TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) B ON A.FormID = B.FORMID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM ( SELECT VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.* FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST
LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.DOCID = GRP.DOCID
WHERE
aprmemberid = #v_USERID#
APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND SHAREUSERID = #v_USERID#)
AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE = '004'
AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.* FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO
LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID
WHERE
aprmemberid = #v_USERID#
APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND SHAREUSERID = #v_USERID#)
AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE = '004'
AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.* FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND APRMEMBERDEPTID = #proxyList[].dept# AND APRMEMBERJOBTITLE = #proxyList[].title#
AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE = '004'
AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND VAPRDOINGDOCLIST.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 UNION ALL
SELECT VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.* FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND APRMEMBERDEPTID = #proxyList[].dept# AND APRMEMBERJOBTITLE = #proxyList[].title# AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004'
AND FUNCTIONTYPE = '004'
AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND VENDCHAMJODOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1
) LIST1 WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT VAPRWILLDOCLIST.* FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VAPRWILLDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017' AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004' AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 ) LIST2 WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT VAPRWILLDOCLIST.* FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON VAPRWILLDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND AprType <> '015' AND DocState <> '017' AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004'
AND AprState != '001'
AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND VAPRWILLDOCLIST.docid in ( SELECT docid FROM tbl_aprlineinfo WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 ) LIST3 WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VGONGRAMAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRTYPE = '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN (SELECT DOCID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY) TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID IN
#v_USERIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType = '015' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState = '010' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY.DOCID IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(SN) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TMP.SN, CONCAT(CONCAT(TMP.OWNERID, '@'), TMP.SN) AS DOCID , TMP.FORMID, TMP.ORGDOCID, TMP.DOCTYPE, TMP.DOCSTATE, TMP.FUNCTIONTYPE, TMP.HREF, TMP.DOCTITLE, TMP.DOCNO, TMP.HASATTACHYN, TMP.HASOPINIONYN, TMP.STARTDATE, TMP.ENDDATE, TMP.WRITERID, TMP.WRITERNAME, TMP.WRITERJOBTITLE, TMP.WRITERDEPTID, TMP.WRITERDEPTNAME, TMP.ISPUBLIC, TMP.WRITERNAME2, TMP.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TMP.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TMPEXP.FORMNAME, TMPEXP.FORMNAME2, TMPEXP.URGENTAPPROVAL, TMPEXP.KEYWORD FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO TMP INNER JOIN TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO TMPEXP ON TMP.OWNERID = TMPEXP.OWNERID AND TMP.TENANT_ID = TMPEXP.TENANT_ID AND TMP.COMPANYID = TMPEXP.COMPANYID AND TMP.SN = TMPEXP.SN LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON TMP.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND TMP.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND CONCAT(CONCAT(TMP.OWNERID, '@'), TMP.SN) = GRP.DOCID WHERE TMP.OWNERID = #v_USERID# AND TMP.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND TMP.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 ) T1 ) T2 WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN (SELECT DOCID, DOCSTATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO) TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE ((TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = '011' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE != '011' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID#)) AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE = '015' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM ( SELECT * FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN
#v_USERIDS[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE APRMEMBERID IN
#v_USERIDS[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE 1 = 1

isEqual.isEqual: IN (SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), SN) FROM TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #KEYWORD#), '%') ESCAPE '\')

isNotEqual.isEqual: IN (SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #KEYWORD#), '%') ESCAPE '\')

isGreaterThan.isEqual: (FORMNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #FORMNAME#), '%') OR FORMNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #FORMNAME#), '%') ESCAPE '\')
VAPRWILLDOCLIST.DOCID IN (SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #KEYWORD#), '%') ESCAPE '\')

select.isEmpty: SELECT COUNT(TBL_FormContainer.FORMCONTID) FROM TBL_FormContainer WHERE FORMCONTPARENTS = #v_PID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(TBL_FormContainer.FormContID) FROM TBL_FormContainer LEFT JOIN TBL_FormContUserGroup ON TBL_FormContainer.FormContID = TBL_FormContUserGroup.FormContID AND TBL_FormContainer.TENANT_ID = TBL_FormContUserGroup.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FormContainer.COMPANYID = TBL_FormContUserGroup.COMPANYID WHERE ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContParents = #v_PID# ) AND ( ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' ) OR ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = #v_PDEPTID# ) OR ( TBL_FormContUserGroup.FormContUserDepID = #v_PDEPTID# ) ) AND TBL_FormContainer.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_FormContainer.COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(APRLINESN) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_LINTEMPLET WHERE TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT CASE WHEN APRDEPTSN = 0 THEN 0 WHEN APRDEPTSN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE APRDEPTSN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(APRDEPTSN) APRDEPTSN FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLET WHERE TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(MODIFYSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(MODIFYSN) end AS MODIFYSN FROM TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(RecordID) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_RECORD.RecordID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo FROM TBL_RECORD LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_RECORD.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ENDDOCNO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID = ENDDOCNO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_RECORD.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = ENDDOCNO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = ENDDOCNO.COMPANYID Inner Join TBL_SEPERATEATTACH On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID
Left Join TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID
LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_RECORD.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID
Left Join TBL_RECROLEINFO R On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.RECORDID = R.RECORDID
Inner Join TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID = TBL_RECORD.DOCID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID IS NOT NULL
Inner Join ( Select ProcessDeptCode, ProcessDeptName, ProcessDeptName2, TaskCode, TaskName, TaskName2, VolumeNo, CabinetID, TCabinetID, TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, DisplayEndDate, DisplayReason, ConfirmFlag, ProductionYear, RegSerialNo, DisplayRecFlag, ExTransYear, TransDelayReason, TransDelayFlag, OwnerDeptID, OwnerTask, TerminateFlag, ExpirationYear, KeepingPeriod , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET On TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo
WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' And ConfirmFlag = '0')
AND
TRIM(OwnerDeptID) = #tempDeptCode#
TRIM(OwnerDeptID) = #upperDeptCode#
WHERE CabinetID IN
#cabinetIDs[]#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4)
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear Between (SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) - '1') AND SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < CAST(SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) ) ) AND CatalogTransferFlag = '0'
AND OwnerDeptID = #tempDeptCode# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate >= CAST(SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear > SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) ) AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear > (SELECT Max(DocTransferYear) FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) ) )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo IN ( Select CabinetClassNo From TBL_CABROLEINFO Where TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND User_ID IN
#charger[]#
AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )
AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND RTRIM(DISPLAYENDDATE) <> '' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < #transExpire# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) ) ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND DocTransferFlag='0'
TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #cabTitle#), '%')
) TBL_CABINET On TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.CabinetID
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.TCabinetID
JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID
WHERE TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_RECORD.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.DelFlag = '0'
CatalogTransferFlag = '1' AND ( DocTransferFlag = '0' OR DocTransferFlag IS NULL ) AND TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND SeperateAttachNo = '00'
DocTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferYear = ( SELECT MAX(DocTransferYear) FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)
TBL_CABINET.TerminateFlag = '1' AND ( SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) - TBL_CABINET.ExpirationYear ) > TBL_CABINET.KeepingPeriod
DocTransferFlag = '1'
( TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(TBL_CABINET.OwnerDeptID) = #deptCode# AND SeperateAttachNo = '00')
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '011' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '2') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID != #relayFormID#
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '014' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '1') AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'N'
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '011' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '2') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = #relayFormID#
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '014' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '1') AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE = '001' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #userID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo = '00' AND TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag = '0'
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('N','T')
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'O'
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN NOT IN ('N', 'O', 'B', 'T')
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'B'
TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode = #recDeptCode#
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%')
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RegisterType = #regType#
TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate >= TO_DATE(#regStartDate#, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate <= TO_DATE(#regEndDate#, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = #formID#
ENDDOCNO.DOCNO Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #orgDocNum#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafterDept#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #docNum#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
TBL_RECORD.RecordID IN (SELECT RecordID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC Where TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ( SC1 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') OR SC2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') OR SC3 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') ) )
( TBL_RECORD.DrafterName Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafter#), '%') OR TBL_RECORD.DrafterName2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafter#), '%') )
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL OR ( SELECT 'Y' FROM DUAL WHERE 0 < ( SELECT COUNT(DocID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DocID = TBL_RECORD.DocID AND AprMemberID = #userID# ) OR TBL_RECORD.DocID = NULL ) = 'Y' ) AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL ) AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID= #tenantID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID= #companyID#
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE = '001' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #userID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #deptCode# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = '00' AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND R.USERID = #userID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = '00'
)

SELECT CASE WHEN USER_ID > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) USER_ID FROM TBL_CABROLEINFO WHERE CabinetClassNo = #v_CabClassNo# AND USER_ID = #v_UserID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

SELECT SUM(CN) count FROM ( SELECT count(cn) cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 like '%a=1%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
UNION
SELECT count(a.cn) cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER a JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER b ON a.CN = b.CN AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID WHERE b.DEPTID = #v_DEPTID#
AND b.ROLL_INFO like '%a=1%'
AND a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 like '%a=1%'
AND a.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND ( APRSTATE = '002' OR APRSTATE = '005' OR APRSTATE = '000' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) CNT FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE = #v_APRTYPE# AND APRSTATE IN ( '002','005' )
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(APRSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(APRSN) END APRSN FROM TBL_SIGNINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESNCNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESNCNT, MAX(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESN FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESNCNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESNCNT, MAX(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESN FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'Address%' AND EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT RegSerialNo FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE IDX = ( SELECT IDX FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RegSerialNo ASC) AS RNUM, TYPE1, TYPE3, ROLLBACKFLAG, TYPE2, TIMESEP, RegSerialNo, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, IDX FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '4') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE RNUM <= 1 ) FOR UPDATE
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, IDX ) VALUES ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '1'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '2'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '3'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '4'), 1, 0, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#, SEQ_TBL_SERIALNUMGEN.NEXTVAL )
sqlMap.select: SELECT RollbackFlag FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SERIALNUMGEN SET RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# + 1 WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))||REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(OPINIONSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(OPINIONSN) END OPINIONSN FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID#
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (MAX(SN) + 1) END FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND OPINIONGB = '001' AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND OPINIONGB = '001' AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN MODIFYSN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MODIFYSN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(MODIFYSN) MODIFYSN FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

isNotEqual.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND (((TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011')) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014', '015') AND PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# )
OR ((TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '013') OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012')
) AND ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID != #v_RELAYFORMID# OR ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '011' ) )
isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y'
AND ((
(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#)
TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#
AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011')) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014', '015')
AND PROCESSORID IS NULL
)
OR (( TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# ) AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTID# AND ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID IS NULL ) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '013') OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012')
)
AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011'
AND ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID != #v_RELAYFORMID# OR ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '011' ) )

select.isEqual: AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORNAME IS NOT NULL

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT CASE WHEN SN IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN SN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(SN) SN FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND ( TO_CHAR(RECEIPTDATE,'YYYY') = #v_YEAR# ) AND EXTRECEPTYN = ( SELECT DECODE(FORMID, #v_RELAYFORMID#, 'Y', 'N') EXTRECEPTYN FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID,TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST C ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = C.CODE2 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST D ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE = D.CODE2 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO E ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = E.DocID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID
WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
AND C.CODE1 ='SA02' AND D.CODE1 ='A04'
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_whereStr_pApprovUser#
DOCNO LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
CASE #v_MULTIDATALANG# WHEN '2' THEN WRITERNAME2 ELSE WRITERNAME END LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
CASE #v_MULTIDATALANG# WHEN '2' THEN WRITERDEPTNAME2 ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME END LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
FORMID = #v_FORMID#
(FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' OR FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PROCESSDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PROCESSDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL AND CONTAINERID NOT IN ( SELECT containerid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = '999' )
CONTAINERID IN
#v_CONTIDARR[]#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
#v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE OR ( SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(COUNT(DocID), 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RET FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND AprMemberID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) = 'Y')
#v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND ( PROCESSYN <> 'H' AND PROCESSYN <> 'I' AND PROCESSYN <> 'N' OR PROCESSYN IS NULL)
PROCESSYN = #v_PROCESSYN#
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME = #v_containerFormName# ESCAPE '\'
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TASKCODE = #v_containerTaskCode#
DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER#
ITEMCODE = #v_ITEMCODE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRTYPE = #v_EAPRTYPE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRSTATE = #v_ENDAPRSTATE#
)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
WHERE CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO LIKE '%' || #col_where_DOCNO# || '%'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #col_where_DOCTITLE# || '%'
(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERNAME# || '%' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERNAME# || '%')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#col_where_STARTDATE_START#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#col_where_STARTDATE_END#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#col_where_ENDDATE_START#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#col_where_ENDDATE_END#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE '%' || #col_where_WRITERDEPTNAME# || '%')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STORAGEPERIOD = #col_where_STORAGEPERIOD#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004' AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '011' AND APRSTATE = '002'

SELECT DISTINCT TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004' AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '011' AND APRSTATE = '002'
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) CNT FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '002'
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) CNT FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSDATE IS NULL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_aprdocinfo SET FUNCTIONTYPE = '010' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ( #v_DEPTINFO# ) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE = '011' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE <> '015' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') <= #v_UNTILYEAR# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(CABINETID) CABCOUNT FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND OWNERDEPTID = #v_DEPTCODE# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #v_UTCYEAR# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('A','E','H','I','R','S','T','V','Y')
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
DOCNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
WRITERNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
RECEIVEDDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionAprSReceivedDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionAprStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
RECEIVEDDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionAprEReceivedDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionAprEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = #q_Map.qOptionSearchStatus#
FORMID = #q_Map.qOptionFormId#
(FORMNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionFormName#), '%') OR FORMNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionFormName#), '%') ESCAPE '\')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionKeyword#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ITEMCODE = #q_Map.qOptionItemCode#
URGENTAPPROVAL = #q_Map.qOptionUrgentApproval#
SELECT USERRIGHT FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND USERID = 'All_User' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT UserRight FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE RecordID = #v_RecID# AND SeperateAttachNo = #v_SepAttNo# AND UserID = 'All_User' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(RecordID) FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN ( SELECT DEPARTMENT DEPTID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_UserID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT DEPTID DEPTID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_AddJobMaster WHERE CN = #v_UserID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
) DEPTINFO ON DEPTINFO.DEPTID = TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode AND DEPTINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID
WHERE RECORDID = #v_RecID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(UserRight) FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND RecordID = #v_RecID# AND SeperateAttachNo = #v_SepAttNo# AND UserID IN (#v_UserID#,'All_User')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, IDX ) VALUES ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '1'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '2'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '3'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) || REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '4'), #v_CurSN#, 1 , #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#, SEQ_TBL_SERIALNUMGEN.NEXTVAL)

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM ( SELECT * FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND ( APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
OR APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND SHAREUSERID = #v_USERID#)
) AND APRTYPE <> '015'
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND ( APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
OR APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND SHAREUSERID = #v_USERID#)
) AND APRTYPE <> '015'
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id#
AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND docid in ( SELECT docid FROM tbl_aprlineinfo WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND aprmemberdeptid = #proxyList[].dept# AND (aprstate = '002' OR aprstate = '005' OR aprstate = '000') AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid IN( SELECT extensionattribute2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.deptid) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.cn = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT physicaldeliveryofficename FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #v_USERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# ) ) UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND docid in ( SELECT docid FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND APRMEMBERDEPTID = #proxyList[].dept# AND APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN( SELECT extensionattribute2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.deptid) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.cn = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT physicaldeliveryofficename FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #v_USERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# ) )
)

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VGONGRAMAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
AND APRMEMBERID IN

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM ( SELECT * FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND AprType <> '015'
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND AprType <> '015' )

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'Address%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'O' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'Address%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

#v_USERIDS[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

#v_USERIDS[]#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_NOTIFICATION (ITEMSEQ, USERID, POSTDATE, SENDER, SUBJECT, TYPE, ETCDATA , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_PS_NOTICE_ITEMSEQ.nextval, #v_PUSERID#, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_PSENDER#,#v_PSUBJECT#, #v_PTYPE#, #v_PETCDATA#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT max(ItemSeq) FROM TBL_NOTIFICATION WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CABINET ( CABINETID, VOLUMENO, CABINETCLASSNO, CREATEDATE, CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, DELFLAG , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID )VALUES ( #v_CABINETID#, #v_VOLUMENO#, #v_CABCLASSNO#, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '0', '0' , #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO (DOCID , RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSYN , PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , PROCESSDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , DEPTMEMBERSN , ReceiptPointName2 , ReceiptMemberJobTitle2 , ReceiptMemberName2 , RouteYN , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSYN , PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , PROCESSDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , DEPTMEMBERSN , ReceiptPointName2 , ReceiptMemberJobTitle2 , ReceiptMemberName2 , RouteYN , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_TMPRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APROPINIONINFO (DocID, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, OPINIONSN, UserName2, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptName2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , USERID , OPINIONGB , CONTENT , USERNAME , USERJOBTITLE , USERDEPTID , USERDEPTNAME , OPINIONSN , UserName2 , UserJobTitle2 , UserDeptName2 , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_TMPAPROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , ATTACHSN , ATTACHDOCNAME , ATTACHDOCURL , SUBATTACHYN , ATTACHUSERID , ATTACHUSERNAME , ATTACHUSERDEPTID , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE , AttachUserName2 , AttachUserJobTitle2 , AttachUserDeptName2 , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRATTACHINFO ( DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, PAGENUM, DISPLAYNAME, BODYATTACH, AttachUserName2, AttachUserJobTitle2, AttachUserDeptName2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, ISBIGATTACH, ISBIGATTACHDEL, SAVEDATE) ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , ATTACHFILESN , VIEWORDER , ATTACHFILENAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE , ATTACHUSERID , ATTACHUSERNAME , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE , ATTACHUSERDEPTID , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME , PAGENUM , DISPLAYNAME , BODYATTACH , AttachUserName2 , AttachUserJobTitle2 , AttachUserDeptName2 , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID, ISBIGATTACH, ISBIGATTACHDEL, SAVEDATE FROM TBL_TMPATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRLINE ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , APRMEMBERSN , ORGUSERID , PROXYUSERID , PROXYUSERNAME , PROXYUSERJOBTITLE , PROXYUSERDEPTID , PROXYUSERDEPTNAME , proxyusername2 , proxyuserjobtitle2 , proxyuserdeptname2 , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_TMPEXPAPRLINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME , APRMEMBERLDAPPATH , RECEIVEDDATE , PROCESSDATE , REASONDONOTAPPROV , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN , AprMemberName2 , AprMemberJobTitle2 , AprMemberDeptName2 , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_TMPAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ( DocID, SECURITYCODE, STORAGEPERIOD, KEYWORD, FORMNAME, COMPANYID, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, URGENTAPPROVAL, SECURITYAPPROVAL, TEMPATTRIBUTE, STATUS, SPECIALRECORDCODE, PUBLICITYCODE, LIMITRANGE, PAGENUM, CABINETID, TASKCODE, DOCNUMCODE, ORGDOCNUMCODE, SEPERATEATTACHXML, SUMMARY, FormName2, ItemName2, TENANT_ID, PUBLICITYYN, FORMVERSION, SUMMARYPATH) ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , SECURITYCODE , STORAGEPERIOD , KEYWORD , FORMNAME , COMPANYID , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , URGENTAPPROVAL , SECURITYAPPROVAL , TEMPATTRIBUTE , STATUS , SPECIALRECORDCODE , PUBLICITYCODE , LIMITRANGE , PAGENUM , CABINETID , TASKCODE , DOCNUMCODE , ORGDOCNUMCODE , SEPERATEATTACHXML , SUMMARY , FormName2 , ItemName2 , TENANT_ID , PUBLICITYYN , FORMVERSION, SUMMARYPATH FROM TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , FORMID , ORGDOCID , DOCTYPE , DOCSTATE , '000' , HREF , DOCTITLE , DOCNO , HASATTACHYN , HASOPINIONYN , NULL , ENDDATE , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERJOBTITLE , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , ISPUBLIC , WriterName2 , WriterJobTitle2 , WriterDeptName2 , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN#)

INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCINFO ( SELECT #v_GDOCID#, FORMID, #v_PDOCID#, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, HREF, DOCTITLE, DOCNO, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERJOBTITLE, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, ISPUBLIC, WRITERNAME2, WRITERJOBTITLE2, WRITERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCSTATE = '015' AND ORGDOCID = #v_TMPDOCID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO ( SELECT #v_GDOCID#, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, PROCESSDATE, REASONDONOTAPPROV, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRTYPE = '015' AND DOCID = ( SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ORGDOCID = #v_TMPDOCID# ) )

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRLINE ( SELECT #v_GDOCID#, APRMEMBERSN, ORGUSERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, PROXYUSERDEPTID, PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, PROXYUSERNAME2, PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_EXPAPRLINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = ( SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ORGDOCID = #v_TMPDOCID# ) )

INSERT INTO TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO (DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYFLAG, PAGENUM, CHKFLAG, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) SELECT #v_PDOCID#, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYFLAG, PAGENUM, CHKFLAG, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_TMPDOCID#

INSERT INTO TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , SN, FILEOPENFLAG, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_TMPDOCID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO (DOCID, OPENFLAG, BASIS, REASON, LISTOPENFLAG, CREATEDATE, OPENLIMITDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_PDOCID#, openflag, basis, reason, listopenflag, SYSDATE, openlimitdate, tenant_id, companyid FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #v_TMPDOCID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #v_DocID#
DELETE FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #v_DocID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ORGDOCID = #v_TMPDOCID#
SELECT SUBSTR(HREF,INSTR(HREF,'/',-1)+1,20) AS DOCID FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN
#v_CabIDList[]#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC)

SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISUsed END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '2')

SELECT MAX(RegSerialNo) FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN '0' ELSE '001' END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '1') ) AND Type2 = #v_TYPE2# AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN '0' ELSE TO_CHAR(#v_numRows#) END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '3') ) AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 1 THEN #v_YEAR# WHEN ISUsed = 2 THEN CONCAT(#v_YEAR#, #v_MONTH#) END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '4') ) AND RollbackFlag = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, IDX ) VALUES ( (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN '0' ELSE '001' END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '1')), #v_TYPE2#, (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISUsed END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '3')), (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 1 THEN #v_YEAR# WHEN ISUsed = 2 THEN CONCAT(#v_YEAR#, #v_MONTH#) END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '4')), #v_RtnSN#, 0 , #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#, SEQ_TBL_SERIALNUMGEN.nextval)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SERIALNUMGEN SET RegSerialNo = #v_RtnSN# + 1 WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN '0' ELSE '001' END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '1')) AND Type2 = #v_TYPE2# AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE #v_numRows# END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '3')) AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 1 THEN #v_YEAR# WHEN ISUsed = 2 THEN CONCAT(#v_YEAR#, #v_MONTH#) END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) WHERE Code = '4')) AND RegSerialNo = #v_RtnSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CABINETCLASS ( CabinetClassNo, ProcessDeptCode, ProcessDeptName, ProcessDeptName2, TaskCode, TaskName, TaskName2, Title, Title2, ProductionYear, RegSerialNo, RecTypeCode, OwnerName, OwnerName2, OwnerID, ExpirationYear, TerminateFlag, KeepingPeriod, KeepingMethod, KeepingPlace, DisplayRecFlag, DisplayEndDate, DisplayReason, SpecialCatalogFlag, OldCabinetFlag, ModifyFlag, NumOfRec, PageOfRec, NumOfElectronicDoc, ConfirmFlag, CreateDate, ConfirmYear, TransDelayFlag, ExTransYear, TransDelayReason, OwnerDeptID, OwnerTask, DelFlag, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT (#v_DDeptCode#||#v_DTaskCode#||#v_YEAR#||#v_CNT#) , #v_DDeptCode# , #v_DDeptName# , #v_DDeptName2# , #v_DTaskCode# , #v_DTaskName# , #v_DTaskName2# , Title , Title2 , ProductionYear , #v_CNT# , RecTypeCode , #v_DeptMName# , #v_DeptMName2# , #v_DeptMID# , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , '0' , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , ConfirmFlag , TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , #v_DDeptCode# , #v_DTaskCode# , '0' , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC) )

INSERT INTO TBL_CABINET ( CabinetID, CabinetClassNo, VolumeNo, CreateDate, CabinetTransferFlag, DelFlag, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT CONCAT(#v_CABINETCLASSNO#, '001') , #v_CABINETCLASSNO# , '001' , TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , '0' , '0' , #v_TENANTID#, #companyID# FROM DUAL )

INSERT INTO TBL_CABROLEINFO ( USER_ID, CabinetClassNo, UserName, UserName2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_DeptMID#, #v_CABINETCLASSNO#, #v_DeptMName#, #v_DeptMName2#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID# FROM DUAL WHERE #v_DeptMID# IS NOT NULL )
sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo CabinetClassNo, NEWTASK.KeepingPeriod, NEWTASK.KeepingMethod, NEWTASK.KeepingPlace, NEWTASK.DisplayRecFlag, NEWTASK.SpecialCatalogFlag FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS ,( SELECT KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , TBL_TASKCODE.SpecialCatalogFlag FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TBL_TASKCODE.TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TBL_TASKCODE.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_TASKCODE.COMPANYID = #companyID# ) NEWTASK WHERE TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo) IN ( SELECT (#v_DDeptCode#||#v_DTaskCode#||#v_YEAR#||#v_CNT#) NewCabClsNo FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC) ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CABINETCLASS SET KeepingPeriod = #KeepingPeriod#, KeepingMethod = #KeepingMethod#, KeepingPlace = #KeepingPlace#, DisplayRecFlag = #DisplayRecFlag#, SpecialCatalogFlag = #SpecialCatalogFlag# WHERE CabinetClassNo = #v_rowID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
