sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB ( SerialNo, CabinetClassNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT '000' , (#v_DDeptCode# || #v_DTaskCode# || #v_YEAR# || #v_CNT#) , ( SELECT SC1 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) , ( SELECT SC2 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) , ( SELECT SC3 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#), #v_TENANTID#, #companyID# FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) )

TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.TENANT_ID, TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.COMPANYID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) tt_tmpClassInfo ON TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.CabinetClassNo = tt_tmpClassInfo.CabinetClassNo WHERE SerialNo != '000' AND tt_tmpClassInfo.CabinetClassNo IN ( SELECT tt_tmpClassInfo.CabinetClassNo FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) tt_tmpClassInfo ON TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.CabinetClassNo = tt_tmpClassInfo.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.TENANT_ID = tt_tmpClassInfo.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.COMPANYID = tt_tmpClassInfo.COMPANYID WHERE SerialNo = '000' AND tt_tmpClassInfo.SpecialCatalogFlag = #v_NewSCFlag# AND SC1 = ( SELECT SC1 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) AND SC2 = ( SELECT SC2 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) AND SC3 = ( SELECT SC3 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)) AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.COMPANYID = #companyID# )

TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) tt_tmpClassInfo JOIN TBL_CABINET ON tt_tmpClassInfo.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND tt_tmpClassInfo.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_CABINET.CabinetID row_id, '1', CabClass.ProcessDeptCode, CabClass.TaskCode, CabClass.ProductionYear, CabClass.RegSerialNo, CabClass.VolumeNo, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), CabClass.CabinetID, CabClass.Title, CabClass.Title2, CabClass.ProcessDeptName, CabClass.ProcessDeptName2, CabClass.TaskName, CabClass.TaskName2, TBL_CABINET.CatalogTransferFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) tt_tmpClassInfo JOIN TBL_CABINET ON tt_tmpClassInfo.CabinetClassNo = tt_tmpClassInfo.COMPANYID = #companyID#) CabClass JOIN TBL_CABINET ON CabClass.NCabClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND CabClass.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND CabClass.COMPANYID = sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CABINET SET CabinetTransferFlag = '1', TDeptCode = #ProcessDeptCode#, TTaskCode = #TaskCode#, TProduceYear = #ProductionYear#, TRegSerialNo = #RegSerialNo#, TVolumeNo = #VolumeNo#, TransferDate = TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TCabinetID = #CabinetID#, TCabinetName = #Title#, TCabinetName2 = #Title2#, TDeptName = #ProcessDeptName#, TDeptName2 = #ProcessDeptName2#, TTaskName = #TaskName#, TTaskName2 = #TaskName2#, CatalogTransferFlag = #CatalogTransferFlag#, CatalogTransferYear = #CatalogTransferYear#, DocTransferFlag = #DocTransferFlag#, DocTransferYear = #DocTransferYear#, ProdReportFlag = #ProdReportFlag# WHERE CABINETID = #v_rowID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

UPDATE TBL_CABINET SET CabinetTransferFlag = '2', TDeptCode = #v_DDeptCode#, TransferDate = TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TDeptName = #v_DDeptName#, TDeptName2 = #v_DDeptName2# WHERE TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TRIM(TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo) IN ( SELECT CabinetClassNo FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) WHERE ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

UPDATE TBL_CABINET SET CabinetTransferFlag = '2', TDeptCode = #v_DDeptCode#, TransferDate = TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TDeptName = #v_DDeptName#, TDeptName2 = #v_DDeptName2# WHERE TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo IN ( SELECT CabinetClassNo FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) WHERE ConfirmFlag = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

UPDATE TBL_CABINETCLASS SET OwnerDeptID = #v_DDeptCode#, OwnerTask = #v_DTaskCode# WHERE TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo IN ( SELECT CabinetClassNo FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabList# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) WHERE ConfirmFlag = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

UPDATE TBL_CABINETCLASS SET CONFIRMFLAG = '1', CONFIRMYEAR = #v_SYSDATE# WHERE CABINETCLASSNO IN ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO FROM ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS WHERE CabinetClassNo IN ( SELECT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND OWNERDEPTID = #v_DEPTCODE# AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID = #companyID#))A) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid FROM TBL_CONTAINER A JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP C ON A.containerid = C.containerid AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.usedepid = #deptID# AND A.containerowndepid = #deptID# ORDER BY B.containertypeid

SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid, A.containerowndepid FROM TBL_CONTAINER A JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP C ON A.containerid = C.containerid AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.usedepid = #deptID# AND A.containerowndepid <> #deptID# ORDER BY A.containerowndepid, B.containertypeid

aprtype IN ('002', '007', '008', '009', '080')

aprtype IN ( '018','019','007','031','002')

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE recordid = #v_RECORDID# AND SeperateAttachNo =#v_SEPATTNO#
sqlMap.select: SELECT VERSION , RECORDID , SEPERATEATTACHNO , REGISTERDATE , TITLE , NUMOFPAGE , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTER , DRAFTER2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , TO_DATE(MODIFYDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') MODIFYDATE , MODIFYREASON , MODIFIERNAME , MODIFIERNAME2 , MODIFIERID , MODIFYFLAG FROM TBL_RECORDHISTORY WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY VERSION ASC

SELECT TBL_RECORD.RecordID , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title , REGISTERTYPE , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , ELECTRONICRECFLAG , SPECIALRECORDCODE , PUBLICITYCODE , PUBLICITYYN , LIMITRANGE , MANUALREGFLAG , to_char(REGISTERDATE + #offsetMin#/(24*60),'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') as REGISTERDATE, EXECUTEDATE , SEPERATEATTACHNO , SPECIALCATALOGFLAG FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_RECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT CASE WHEN VERSION IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE VERSION + 1 END FROM ( SELECT MAX(VERSION) VERSION FROM TBL_RECORDHISTORY WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECORDHISTORY ( VERSION, RECORDID, SEPERATEATTACHNO, REGISTERDATE, TITLE, NUMOFPAGE, APRMEMBERTITLE, APRMEMBERTITLE2, DRAFTER, DRAFTER2, EXECUTEDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYREASON, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYFLAG, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_newVersion# , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo , REGISTERDATE , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , TO_CHAR(TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CreateDate,'YYYYMMDD') , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , '0' , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH JOIN TBL_RECORD ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBL_RECORD.RecordID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = #companyID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_RECORDHISTORY ( VERSION, RECORDID, SEPERATEATTACHNO, REGISTERDATE, TITLE, NUMOFPAGE, APRMEMBERTITLE, APRMEMBERTITLE2, DRAFTER, DRAFTER2, EXECUTEDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYREASON, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYFLAG, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_newVersion# , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo , REGISTERDATE , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , #v_DATE# , #v_CHANGEREASON# , #v_USERID# , #v_USERNAME# , #v_USERNAME2# , '0' , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH JOIN TBL_RECORD ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBL_RECORD.RecordID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = #companyID#)

update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH SET NUMOFPAGE = #v_NUMOFPAGE#, MODIFYFLAG = '1', TITLE = #v_TITLE# WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH SET NUMOFPAGE = #v_NUMOFPAGE#, MODIFYFLAG = '1' WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RECORD SET REGISTERDATE = TO_DATE(#v_REGDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), APRMEMBERTITLE = #v_APRMEMTITLE#, APRMEMBERTITLE2 = #v_APRMEMTITLE2#, DRAFTERNAME = #v_DRAFTER#, DRAFTERNAME2 = #v_DRAFTER2#, EXECUTEDATE = #v_EXEDATE#, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME = #v_RECEIPTMEM#, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 = #v_RECEIPTMEM2#, ELECTRONICRECFLAG = #v_ELECFLAG# WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND EXTRECEPTYN = #v_EXTRECEPTYN#
DEPTID = #v_DEPTID#
DEPTID = #upperDeptCode#
MANAGEDEPTID = #v_MANAGEDEPTID#
ORGANID = #v_ORGANID#
ORGANID = #upperDeptCode#
DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
CHARGENAME LIKE '%' || #v_CHARGENAME# || '%'
RECEIPTDATE > TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_SREGDATE#, 1, 19), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
RECEIPTDATE < TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_EREGDATE#, 1, 19), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RECEIPTDATE , SN ) AS ROWNUM_,A.* FROM ( SELECT A.SN, A.DOCID, A.HREF, A.RECEIPTDATE, A.ORGANID, A.ORGAN, A.ORGAN2, A.DOCNUMBER, A.MANAGEDEPTID, A.MANAGEDEPT, A.MANAGEDEPT2, A.CHARGEID, A.CHARGENAME, A.CHARGENAME2, A.DEPTID, A.REMARK, A.ORGDOCNUMCODE, A.DOCTITLE, A.ORGANUSERNAME FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.EXTRECEPTYN = #v_EXTRECEPTYN#
A.DEPTID = #v_DEPTID#
A.DEPTID = #upperDeptCode#
A.SN BETWEEN #iv_PAGESIZE2# AND #iv_PAGESIZE#
A.MANAGEDEPTID = #v_MANAGEDEPTID#
A.ORGANID = #v_ORGANID#
A.ORGANID = #upperDeptCode#
A.DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
A.CHARGENAME LIKE '%' || #v_CHARGENAME# || '%'
A.RECEIPTDATE > TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_SREGDATE#, 1, 19), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
A.RECEIPTDATE < TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_EREGDATE#, 1, 19), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY SN DESC, DOCTITLE DESC, DOCNUMBER DESC, ORGAN DESC, MANAGEDEPT DESC, CHARGENAME DESC,
RECEIPTDATE DESC RECEIPTDATE DESC
ORDER BY A.RECEIPTDATE DESC, SN DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#
ORDER BY SN DESC, DOCTITLE DESC, DOCNUMBER DESC, ORGAN DESC, MANAGEDEPT DESC, CHARGENAME DESC, RECEIPTDATE DESC RECEIPTDATE
ORDER BY RECEIPTDATE, SN
) B WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_PAGESIZE2#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(
ORDER BY DISPCLASSNO TITLE RECTYPECODE ENDYEAR DISPLAYRECFLAG KEEPINGPERIOD KEEPINGMETHOD KEEPINGPLACE CREATEDATE TRANSFERFLAG DELAYFLAG DELAYENDYFLAG TERMINATEFLAG DESC ASC
ORDER BY CREATEDATE DESC, CABINETID DESC
) AS ROWNUM_, N.* FROM ( SELECT TBL_CABINET.CabinetID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RegSerialNo, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProductionYear, TBL_CABINET.VolumeNo, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ModifyFlag, TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2, TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RecTypeCode as RecTypeCode, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CreateDate + (#offsetMin#/(24*60)) AS ClassCreateDate, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.SpecialCatalogFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerDeptID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerTask, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag
CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(TRIM(ProcessDeptCode),'-'),TaskCode),'-'),ProductionYear),'-'),TRIM(LEADING'0' FROM RegSerialNo)),'('),TRIM(LEADING'0' FROM VolumeNo)),')') AS DispClassNo
TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title2 AS Title
TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title AS Title
TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear AS EndYear
TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag AS DisplayRecFlag
TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPeriod AS KeepingPeriod
TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingMethod AS KeepingMethod
TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace AS KeepingPlace
TO_CHAR(TBL_CABINET.CreateDate + #offsetMin#/(24*60), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS CreateDate
#transferFlag# AS TransferFlag
Case TransDelayFlag When '1' Then 'Y' Else 'N' End AS DelayFlag
TBL_CABINETCLASS.DELAYENDYFLAG
FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo WHERE
TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0'
TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND ( ( TRIM(OwnerDeptID) = #deptCode# TRIM(OwnerDeptID) = #upperDeptCode# AND ConfirmFlag = '0' ) OR ( TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode) = #deptCode# TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode) = #upperDeptCode# AND ConfirmFlag = '1') )
TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag != '2'
TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerDeptID) = #deptCode# TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerDeptID) = #upperDeptCode#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%')
TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%')
#taskCodeAry[]#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProductionYear >= #sProduceYear#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProductionYear <= #eProduceYear#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear >= #sExpYear#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear <= #eExpYear#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.RecTypeCode = #recTypeCode#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPeriod = #keepPeriod#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingMethod = #keepMethod#
TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = #keepPlace#

)
AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND RTRIM(DISPLAYENDDATE) <> '' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < #transExpire# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) ) ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND DocTransferFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = #nowYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear Between #nowYear# - '1' And #nowYear# ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < CAST(#nowYear# AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear = #nowYear# ) ) ) AND CatalogTransferFlag = '0'
AND CatalogTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferFlag = '0' AND CatalogTransferYear = ( SELECT MAX(CatalogTransferYear) From TBL_CABINET A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )
AND DocTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferYear = #nowYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate >= CAST(#nowYear# AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear > #nowYear# ) ) AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = #nowYear# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear > ( SELECT MAX(DocTransferYear) From TBL_CABINET A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) ) )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND (#nowYear# - TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear) > TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPeriod
AND DocTransferFlag = '1'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #accountYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelayEndYFlag = 'Y' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #accountYear# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID#
) N ) A ) B
) N ) A WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #start# ) B WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #end#
) N ) A WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #start# ) B WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #end#
) N ) A WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #start# ) B WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #end#

TBCABCLS.DisplayRecFlag , TBCABCLS.DisplayEndDate , TBCABCLS.DisplayReason , TBCABCLS.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBCABCLS.OldCabinetFlag , TBCABCLS.ModifyFlag , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH WHERE CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = #companyID# ) NUMOFREC , (SELECT ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN A IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE A END FROM ( SELECT SUM(NumOfPage) A FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH WHERE CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = #companyID#) A) + ( SELECT CASE WHEN B IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE B END FROM ( SELECT SUM(TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.PageNum) B FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.DocID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID# )B )) FROM DUAL) NUMOFPAGE , #v_cabID# NUMOFFILE , TBCABCLS.ConfirmFlag , TBCABCLS.ConfirmYear , CATALOGTRANSFERFLAG , CATALOGTRANSFERYEAR , DOCTRANSFERFLAG , TBCAB.TProduceYear , TBCAB.TRegSerialNo , TBCAB.TVolumeNo , TBCAB.TCabinetName , TBCAB.TCabinetName2 , TBCAB.TDeptName , TBCAB.TDeptName2 , TBCAB.TTaskName , TBCAB.TTaskName2 , TBCAB.TransferDate , = TBCAB.TENANT_ID AND TBCABCLS.COMPANYID = TBCAB.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_OLDCABINETEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo = TBOLD.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABCLS.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID AND sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO ( DOCID, RECEIPTPOINTID, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, EXTRECEPTYN, PROCESSYN, PROCESSSN, CANEDITYN, EXTRECEPTEMAIL, RECEIPTMEMBERID, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, PROCESSDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2, DEPTMEMBERSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSYN , PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , PROCESSDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , DEPTMEMBERSN, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND PROCESSYN IN ( 'N','E','T') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB (CabinetClassNo, SerialNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) Values (#v_CABINETCLASSNO#, #v_SERIALNO#, #v_SC1#, #v_SC2#, #v_SC3#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#)

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO SET DEPTMEMBERSN = #v_DEPTMEMBERSN# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID#

SELECT SERIALNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC WHERE RECORDID = ( SELECT DISTINCT RECORDID FROM TBL_RECORD WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SERIALNO

SELECT CASE WHEN FLAGCOUNT > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM( SELECT CASE WHEN FLAG='N' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DocID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) ELSE 1 END AS FLAGCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN DocState='017' THEN 'Y' WHEN FunctionType = ' ' OR FunctionType ='000' OR FunctionType IS NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN COUNT(DOCSTATE) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM ( SELECT DocState , FunctionType FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DocID =#v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) GROUP BY DocState,FunctionType ))

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECORDHISTORY (Version, RecordID, SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, Title, NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, Drafter, Drafter2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, ModifyDate, ModifyReason, ModifierID, ModifierName, ModifierName2, ModifyFlag, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (Select #v_HISTORYCNT#, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, DrafterName, DrafterName2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, TO_CHAR(TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CreateDate,'YYYYMMDD'), NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, '1' , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID From TBL_SEPERATEATTACH Inner Join TBL_RECORD ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBL_RECORD.RecordID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID Where TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo= #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_RECORDHISTORY (Version, RecordID, SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, Title, NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, Drafter, Drafter2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, ModifyDate, ModifyReason, ModifierID, ModifierName, ModifierName2, ModifyFlag, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (Select #v_HISTORYCNT#, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, DrafterName, DrafterName2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, #v_SYSDATE#, #v_CHANGEREASON#, #v_USERID#, #v_USERNAME#, #v_USERNAME2#, '1' , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID From TBL_SEPERATEATTACH Inner Join TBL_RECORD ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBL_RECORD.RecordID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID Where TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo= #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = #companyID#)

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC (RecordID, SerialNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_RECORDID#, SerialNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.TENANT_ID , TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.COMPANYID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB INNER JOIN (SELECT TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_CABID# AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID = #companyID#) TBL_CABINET ON TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID Where SerialNo='000' AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID= #companyID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC (RecordID, SerialNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) Values (#v_RECORDID#, #v_SERIALNO#, #v_SC1#, #v_SC2#, #v_SC3#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#)

CODE1 = 'A52' AND

select.isEqual:
SELECT TBL_TASKCODE.taskname, keepingperiod , TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode FROM TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO JOIN TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_TASKCODE ON TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode = tbl_taskcode.taskcode AND TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = tbl_taskcode.TENANT_ID AND TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = tbl_taskcode.COMPANYID AND ( TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode IS NOT NULL ) AND ( TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode <> ' ' ) AND ( TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ContainerID IN ( SELECT tbL_Container.ContainerID FROM tbL_Container WHERE ( tbL_Container.ContainerOwnDepID = #v_DEPTID# )
AND tbL_Container.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND tbL_Container.COMPANYID = #companyID#)) AND TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode, TBL_TASKCODE.taskname, keepingperiod ORDER BY TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode
select.isNotEqual: SELECT TBL_TASKCODE.taskname2 taskname, keepingperiod, TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode FROM TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO JOIN TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID JOIN tbl_taskcode ON TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode = tbl_taskcode.taskcode AND TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = tbl_taskcode.TENANT_ID AND TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = tbl_taskcode.COMPANYID AND ( TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode IS NOT NULL ) AND ( TBl_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode <> ' ' ) AND ( TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ContainerID IN ( SELECT tbL_Container.ContainerID FROM tbL_Container WHERE ( tbL_Container.ContainerOwnDepID = #v_DEPTID# ) AND tbL_Container.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND tbL_Container.COMPANYID = #companyID#)) AND TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBl_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode, TBL_TASKCODE.taskname2, keepingperiod ORDER BY TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.taskcode

SELECT SUBSTR(CONCAT('0000000000' , ((CASE WHEN MAX(USERCONTID) IS NULL THEN '0000000000' ELSE MAX(USERCONTID) END) + 1 )), -10, 10) FROM TBL_USERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

, OWNUSERID = #v_POWNUSERID#
, USERCONTNAME = #v_PUSERCONTNAME#
, PARENTCONTID = #v_PPARENTCONTID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT TASKCODE,
CASE WHEN (TASKNAME2 = '' OR TASKNAME2 IS NULL) THEN TASKNAME ELSE TASKNAME2 END TASKNAME,
TASKNAME,
SUBCATEGORYCODE, MCATEGORYCODE, CATEGORYCODE, CASE WHEN (CATEGORYCODE = MCATEGORYCODE AND MCATEGORYCODE = SUBCATEGORYCODE) THEN '1' WHEN (CATEGORYCODE != MCATEGORYCODE AND MCATEGORYCODE = SUBCATEGORYCODE) THEN '2' ELSE '3' END "LEVEL" FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TASKCODE = #taskCode#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_USERCONTLIST WHERE USERCONTID = #v_CONTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_ID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT tbl_Container.ContainerID , tbl_Container.ContainerTypeID , tbl_Container.ContainerOwnDepID , tbl_ContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbl_ContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 FROM tbl_Container JOIN tbl_ContainerType ON tbl_Container.ContainerTypeID = tbl_ContainerType.ContainerTypeID AND tbl_Container.COMPANYID = tbl_ContainerType.COMPANYID AND tbl_Container.TENANT_ID = tbl_ContainerType.TENANT_ID WHERE CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #v_DEPTID# AND tbl_Container.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND tbl_Container.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERCONTLIST ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_USERCONTLIST.DOCID
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_USERCONTLIST.TENANT_ID WHERE USERCONTID = #v_CONTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DelFlag IS NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID#
UNION ALL
SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
DOCNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
WRITERNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
LINKDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionStartDateAF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
LINKDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionStartDateBF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDateAF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDateBF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionFormName#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionKeyword#), '%')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ITEMCODE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionItemcode#), '%')

SELECT A.DOCID, A.DOCTYPE, A.DOCSTATE, A.FUNCTIONTYPE, A.HREF, A.DOCTITLE, A.DOCNO, A.HASATTACHYN, A.HASOPINIONYN, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERJOBTITLE, A.WRITERDEPTID, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.FORMID, A.CONTAINERID, A.FORMNAME, A.STATUS, A.ORGDOCID, A.ISPUBLIC, A.EDMSYN, A.LINKDATE, A.DESCRIPTION, A.COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT rownum rnum, data.* FROM ( SELECT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID,
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME,
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME,
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBL_USERCONTLIST.LINKDATE, TBL_USERCONTLIST.DESCRIPTION, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_USERCONTLIST ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_USERCONTLIST.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_USERCONTLIST.TENANT_ID
WHERE USERCONTID = #v_CONTID# AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DelFlag IS NULL AND TBL_USERCONTLIST.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID#
UNION ALL
SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
DOCNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
WRITERNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
LINKDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionStartDateAF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
LINKDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionStartDateBF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDateAF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDateBF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionFormName#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionKeyword#), '%')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ITEMCODE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionItemcode#), '%')
ORDER BY
DOCNO DESC, DOCTITLE DESC, WRITERNAME DESC, ENDDATE DESC, FORMNAME DESC, HASATTACHYN DESC, ISPUBLIC DESC,
LINKDATE DESC LINKDATE DESC
LINKDATE DESC
) data ) A where rnum > #v_PQUERYSIZESUB# AND rnum <= (#v_PQUERYSIZESUB# + #v_PLISTCOUNT# + 1)
ORDER BY
DOCNO DESC, DOCTITLE DESC, WRITERNAME DESC, ENDDATE DESC, FORMNAME DESC, HASATTACHYN DESC, ISPUBLIC DESC, LINKDATE DESC LINKDATE
LINKDATE

TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME,

WHERE USERCONTID = #v_CONTID# AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DelFlag IS NULL
AND TBL_USERCONTLIST.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID#
UNION ALL

DOCNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
WRITERNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
LINKDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionStartDateAF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
LINKDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionStartDateBF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDateAF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDateBF#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionFormName#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionKeyword#), '%')
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ITEMCODE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionItemcode#), '%')
ORDER BY
DOCNO DESC, DOCTITLE DESC, WRITERNAME DESC, ENDDATE DESC, FORMNAME DESC, HASATTACHYN DESC, ISPUBLIC DESC,
LINKDATE DESC LINKDATE DESC
LINKDATE DESC
) A ORDER BY
DOCNO DESC, DOCTITLE DESC, WRITERNAME DESC, ENDDATE DESC, FORMNAME DESC, HASATTACHYN DESC, ISPUBLIC DESC, LINKDATE DESC LINKDATE
LINKDATE
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERCONTLIST WHERE USERCONTID = #v_CONTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 IS NULL THEN UNISTR('0') ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 END FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM TBL_SPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE DEPTID = #deptID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY CONTTYPE, SN

SELECT B.KEEPPERIOD, B.SECURITYLEVEL, B.ISPUBLIC, B.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, B.ITEMNAME2, B.USEFLAG, B.KEEPPERIODCODE, (SELECT CONCAT(CABINETCLASSNO, '001') FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TASKCODE = B.ITEMCODE ) CABINETID FROM TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM B WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND B.FORMID = #formID#

SELECT DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, DOCTITLE, DOCNO, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITERJOBTITLE, WRITERJOBTITLE2, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME2, ISPUBLIC FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #orgDocID#

SELECT SECURITYCODE, STORAGEPERIOD, KEYWORD, FORMNAME, FORMNAME2, COMPANYID, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, ITEMNAME2, URGENTAPPROVAL, TEMPATTRIBUTE, STATUS, PUBLICITYCODE, PUBLICITYYN, CABINETID, TASKCODE, DOCNUMCODE, SUMMARY, SECURITYAPPROVAL FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #orgDocID#

SELECT B.CONTAINERTYPEID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_CONTAINER B ON A.CONTAINERID = B.CONTAINERID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.DOCID = #pDocID#

SELECT APRTYPE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_APRMEMBERID# AND ( APRSTATE = #v_STAASJINHANG# OR APRSTATE = #v_STAASBORYU# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #deptID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ( DocID, FormID, OrgDocID, DocType, DocState, FunctionType, Href, DocTitle, DocNo, HasAttachYN, HasOpinionYN, StartDate, WriterID, EndDate, WriterName, WriterName2, WriterJobTitle, WriterJobTitle2, WriterDeptID, WriterDeptName, WriterDeptName2, ContainerID, isPublic, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_NEWDOCID#, FormID , OrgDocID , DocType ,#v_DOCSTATE# , '003', #v_ENDURL#, DocTitle, DocNo, HasAttachYN, HasOpinionYN, StartDate, WriterID, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), WriterName, WriterName2, WriterJobTitle , WriterJobTitle2 , WriterDeptID , WriterDeptName , WriterDeptName2 , #v_CONTAINERID# , isPublic, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ( DocID, AprMemberSN, AprType, AprState, AprMemberID, AprMemberIsDeptYN, AprMemberName, AprMemberName2, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2, AprMemberLDAPPath, ReceivedDate, ReasonDoNotApproval, ProcessDate, isProposerYN, isBriefUserYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_NEWDOCID#, AprMemberSN ,AprType , AprState, AprMemberID, AprMemberIsDeptYN, AprMemberName, AprMemberName2, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2, AprMemberLDAPPath, ReceivedDate, ReasonDoNotApprov, ProcessDate, isProposerYN, isBriefUserYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO A WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_APRATTACHINFO ( DocID, AttachFileSN, VIEWORDER, AttachFileName, AttachFileHref, AttachUserJobTitle, AttachUserJobTitle2, AttachFileSize, AttachUserID, AttachUserName, AttachUserName2, AttachUserDeptID, AttachUserDeptName, AttachUserDeptName2, PageNum, DisplayName, BodyAttach, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, ISBIGATTACH, ISBIGATTACHDEL, SAVEDATE) ( SELECT #v_DOCID#, AttachFileSN, VIEWORDER, AttachFileName, AttachFileHref, AttachUserJobTitle, AttachUserJobTitle2, AttachFileSize, AttachUserID, AttachUserName, AttachUserName2, AttachUserDeptID, AttachUserDeptName, AttachUserDeptName2, PageNum, DisplayName, BodyAttach, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, ISBIGATTACH, ISBIGATTACHDEL, SAVEDATE FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO A WHERE DOCID = #beforeDocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO ( DocID, AttachSN, AttachDocName, AttachDocURL, SubAttachYN, AttachUserID, AttachUserName, AttachUserName2, AttachUserDeptID, AttachUserDeptName, AttachUserDeptName2, AttachUserJobTitle, AttachUserJobTitle2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_NEWDOCID#, AttachSN, AttachDocName, AttachDocURL, SubAttachYN, AttachUserID, AttachUserName, AttachUserName2, AttachUserDeptID, AttachUserDeptName, AttachUserDeptName2 , AttachUserJobTitle, AttachUserJobTitle2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO A WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO ( DocID, UserID, OpinionGB, CONTENT, UserName, UserName2, UserJobTitle, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptID, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, OpinionSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #v_NEWDOCID#, UserID, OpinionGB, CONTENT, UserName, UserName2, UserJobTitle, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptID, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, OpinionSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO A WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET AprState = #v_APRSTATE#, ProcessYN = 'Y', ProcessDate = TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ReceiveSN = #pReceiveSN#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO (ReceiveSN, DocID, SentDeptID, SentDeptName, SentDeptName2, ReceivedDeptID, ReceivedDeptName, ReceivedDeptName2, DocState, AprState, ProcessDate, ProcessYN, ProcessDocID, ProcessorID, ProcessorName, ProcessorName2, ProcessorJobTitle, ProcessorJobTitle2, ParentsDocID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) (SELECT #v_TEMPSN#, DocID, ReceivedDeptID, ReceivedDeptName, ReceivedDeptName2, #v_DEPTID#, #v_DEPTNAME#, #v_DEPTNAME2#, DocState, #v_APRSTATE#,TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'N', '', '', '', '', '', '', DocID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ReceiveSN = #v_MAXSN#)

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET AprState = #v_APRSTATE1#, ProcessDate = TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DocID = #v_DOCID# AND AprState = #v_APRSTATE2#
UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET StartDate = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DocID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT APRTYPE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_PDEPTID# AND APRMEMBERISDEPTYN = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET DocState = #v_APRSTATE#, FunctionType = #v_FUNCTIONTYPE#, StartDate = TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO (DocID, AprMemberSN, AprType, AprState, AprMemberID, AprMemberIsDeptYN, AprMemberName, AprMemberName2, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2, AprMemberLDAPPath, ReceivedDate, ProcessDate, ReasonDoNotApprov, isProposerYN, isBriefUserYN, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_DOCID#, '1', #v_APRTYPE#, #v_APRSTATE#, #v_WRITERID#, 'N', #v_WRITERNAME#, #v_WRITERNAME2#, #v_WRITERJOBTITLE#, #v_WRITERJOBTITLE2#, #v_WRITERDEPTID#, #v_WRITERDEPTNAME#, #v_WRITERDEPTNAME2#, #orgCompanyID#, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,NULL, '', 'N', 'N' , #companyID#, #v_TENANTID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRLINE (docid, aprmemberSN, orguserid, proxyuserid, proxyusername, proxyusername2, proxyuserjobtitle, proxyuserjobtitle2, proxyuserdeptid, proxyuserdeptname, proxyuserdeptname2, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_DOCID#, #v_SN#, #v_WRITERID#, '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', #companyID#, #v_TENANTID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO (DocID, AprMemberSN, AprType, AprState, AprMemberID, AprMemberIsDeptYN, AprMemberName, AprMemberName2, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2, AprMemberLDAPPath, ReceivedDate, ProcessDate, ReasonDoNotApprov, isProposerYN, isBriefUserYN, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_DOCID# , '2', #v_APRTYPE#, #v_APRSTATE#, #v_USERID# , 'N', #v_USERNAME#, #v_USERNAME2# , #v_TITLE#, #v_TITLE2#, #v_DEPTID#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #orgCompanyID#, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '', 'N', 'N', #companyID#, #v_TENANTID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCINFO ( DocID, FormID, OrgDocID, DocType, DocState, FunctionType, Href, DocTitle, DocNo, HasAttachYN, HasOpinionYN, StartDate, EndDate, WriterID, WriterName, WriterName2, WriterJobTitle, WriterJobTitle2, WriterDeptID, WriterDeptName, WriterDeptName2, isPublic, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_NEWID#, FormID, OrgDocID, #v_DOCSTATE#, DocState, #v_FUNCTIONTYPE#, #v_URL#, DocTitle, DocNo, HasAttachYN, HasOpinionYN, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), NULL, WriterID, WriterName, WriterName2, WriterJobTitle, WriterJobTitle2, WriterDeptID, WriterDeptName, WriterDeptName2, isPublic, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT ORGDOCID , TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERNAME2 , WRITERJOBTITLE , WRITERJOBTITLE2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WRITERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT STREETADDRESS FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
#userIDArray[]#

SELECT AprType, AprMemberSN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND APRMEMBERSN = (SELECT MAX(APRMEMBERSN) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND APRTYPE IN (#staATBuSeuSoonChaHyubJo#, #staATBuSeuByungRyulHyubJo#, #staATByungRyulHyubJo#) AND APRSTATE IN (#staASSungIn#, #staASBanSong#, #staASWheSong#))
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND APRTYPE = #aprType# AND APRSTATE IN (#staASJinHang#, #staASBoRyu#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_gongRamDocID#

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, PROCESSDATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = ( SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ORGDOCID = ( SELECT DOCID FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(HREF,INSTR(HREF,'/',-1)+1,20)AS DOCID, CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), TO_CHAR(SN)) AS OWNERID FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE OWNERID = #docID# ) ) AND APRTYPE = '015' ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, PROCESSDATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND APRTYPE = '015' ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ORGDOCID = #docID# AND DOCSTATE = '015'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CABINET SET DELFLAG = 1, DELETEDATE = TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DELETECABINETINFO ( CABINETID, DELUSERID, IPADDRESS, COMPANYID, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_CABINETID#, #v_DELUSERID#, #v_IPADDRESS#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT SUM(CNT) AS CNT_RESULT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(CABINETID) AS CNT FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# UNION
SELECT COUNT(CABINETID) FROM TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO A LEFT JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND B.DOCSTATE != '015') cnt

SELECT TO_CHAR(ENDDATE +( #offsetMin#/(24*60)), 'YYYYMMDD HH24MISS') AS ENDDATE FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND WRITERDEPTID = #iv_Type2# ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SERIALNUMGEN SET RegSerialNo = '1' WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#) A WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)B WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)C WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )D WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , '회송문서' APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , 'Return a document' APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode, B.PublicityYn FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid= #docID#
AND (opiniongb = '002' OR opiniongb = '003')
AND opiniongb = #opinionType#
DELETE FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #docID# AND opiniongb <> '008'
DELETE FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #docID# AND opiniongb = '008'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APROPINIONINFO SET opinionSN = #opinionSN# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #docID# AND opiniongb = '008'

UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET hasopinionyn = 'N' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #docID# AND (SELECT COUNT(docid) FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #docID#) = 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND (APRTYPE != '002' AND APRTYPE != '007')

SELECT A.APRMEMBERSN FROM (SELECT ROWNUM as NUM, APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND (APRTYPE != '002' AND APRTYPE != '007') ) A
WHERE A.NUM = (#v_memSN# + 1)

SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND (APRTYPE = '008' OR APRTYPE = '011')
AND (APRSTATE = '002' OR APRSTATE = '005')
AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_memSN#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND (APRTYPE = '008' OR APRTYPE = '001')

SELECT APRTYPE, APRMEMBERSN, CASE WHEN OPINIONGB IS NULL THEN '' ELSE OPINIONGB END AS OPINIONGB, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERNAME, PROCESSDATE FROM TBl_ENDAPRLINEINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBl_ENDAPROPINIONINFO B ON A.APRMEMBERID = B.USERID AND A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE (A.DOCID = #docID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND (B.OPINIONGB = '001' OR B.OPINIONGB IS NULL) AND (A.APRTYPE IN ('001', '004', '016', '018', '008', '019')) ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN
SELECT * FROM TBL_RECRELAYINFO WHERE XDOCID = #xDocID# AND XTOCODE = #xToCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RECRELAYINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_docID# AND XDOCID = #xDocID# AND XTOCODE = #xToCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

DELETE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID IN ( SELECT A.DOCID FROM TBL_RECRELAYINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.XDOCID = #xDocID# AND XTOCODE = #xToCode# AND (B.HREF IS NULL OR B.HREF = ''))

AND XTOCODE = #DEPTID#

APRMEMBERSN <= ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE = #v_APRTYPE# AND APRSTATE = #v_APRSTATE# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ('001', '003', '004','040')
