AND receiptpointid = #receiptPointID#
AND receiptpointid LIKE #receiptPointID# || '%'
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT STARTDATE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND
APRMEMBERID = #v_PUSERID# AND APRTYPE <> '015'
UNION ALL SELECT STARTDATE FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND
APRMEMBERID = #v_PUSERID# AND APRTYPE <> '015'
UNION ALL SELECT STARTDATE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id#
AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND docid in ( SELECT docid FROM tbl_aprlineinfo WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND APRMEMBERDEPTID = #proxyList[].dept# AND (aprstate = '002' OR aprstate = '005' OR aprstate = '000') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid IN( SELECT extensionattribute2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.deptid) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.cn = #v_PUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT physicaldeliveryofficename FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #v_PUSERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# ) ) UNION ALL
SELECT STARTDATE FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND docid in ( SELECT docid FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND APRMEMBERDEPTID = #proxyList[].dept# AND APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_PUSERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )
) A WHERE 1 = 1 AND
A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_NOWTIME#,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI:SS') - 6/(24)
A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_NOWTIME#,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI:SS') - 1 AND TO_DATE(#v_NOWTIME#,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI:SS') - 6/(24) > A.STARTDATE
A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_NOWTIME#,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI:SS') - 7 AND TO_DATE(#v_NOWTIME#,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI:SS') - 1 > A.STARTDATE
A.STARTDATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#v_NOWTIME#,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI:SS') , 1) AND TO_DATE(#v_NOWTIME#,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI:SS') - 7 > A.STARTDATE
ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#v_NOWTIME#,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI:SS') , -1) > A.STARTDATE

SELECT HREF FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# UNION SELECT HREF FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE 1 = 1 AND CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO (DOCID, RECEIPTPOINTID, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, EXTRECEPTYN, PROCESSYN, PROCESSSN, CANEDITYN, EXTRECEPTEMAIL, DEPTMEMBERSN, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#docID#, #deptID#, #deptName1#, 'N', 'N', 1, 'N', #companyID#, 1, #deptName2#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RECORD_TEMP WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.DOCID, B.SEPERATEATTACHNO, A.PROCESSDEPTCODE, A.PROCESSDEPTNAME, A.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, B.REGISTERTYPE, TO_CHAR(A.REGISTERDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REGISTERDATE, A.REGISTERYEAR, B.TITLE, A.APRMEMBERTITLE, A.APRMEMBERTITLE2, A.DRAFTERNAME, A.DRAFTERNAME2, TO_CHAR(A.EXECUTEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXECUTEDATE, A.RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, A.RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, A.SENDINGMEMBERNAME, A.DELIVERYNO, A.PRODUCEDEPTREGNO, A.ELECTRONICRECFLAG, B.CABINETID, B.NUMOFPAGE, C.RECORDTYPE, C.SUMMARY, A.DOCATTACHNAME FROM TBL_RECORD_TEMP A JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH_TEMP B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_AUDIO_VISUALRECEXINFO_TEMP C ON A.DOCID = C.DOCID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND B.SEPERATEATTACHNO = C.SEPERATEATTACHNO WHERE A.DOCID = #orgDocID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY B.SEPERATEATTACHNO
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH_TEMP SET CABINETID = #v_CABID# WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SepAttachNo# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UPDATE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET DELFLAG = '1' WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ORGDOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(ORGDOCID, ' ') AS ORGDOCID FROM
TBL_APRDOCINFO
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO
WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT RECORDID FROM TBL_RECORD_TEMP WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RECORD_TEMP SET APRMEMBERTITLE = #v_aprmemberTitle#, APRMEMBERTITLE2 = #v_aprmemberTitle2#, DRAFTERNAME = #v_drafterName#, DRAFTERNAME2 = #v_drafterName2#, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME = #v_receiptMember#, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 = #v_receiptMember2#, DELIVERYNO = #v_deliveryNO#, PRODUCEDEPTREGNO = #v_originRegSN# WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND RECORDID = #recordID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH_TEMP SET TITLE = #v_title# WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND RECORDID = #recordID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = '00' AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_AUDIO_VISUALRECEXINFO_TEMP SET SUMMARY = #v_audioVisualRecSummary#, RECORDTYPE = #v_audioVisualRecInfo# WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND RECORDID = #recordID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = '00' AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_docID# AND RECORDID = #v_recordID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #v_companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_TMP (DOCID, RECORDID, SERIALNO, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#v_docID#, #v_recordID#, #v_serialNO#, #v_SC1#, #v_SC2#, #v_SC3#, #v_tenantID#, #v_companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_TMP (DOCID, RecordID, SerialNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_docID#, #v_recordID#, SerialNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.TENANT_ID , TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.COMPANYID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB INNER JOIN (SELECT TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_cabID# AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID = #v_companyID#) TBL_CABINET ON TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID Where SerialNo='000' AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID= #v_tenantID# AND TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID= #v_companyID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID, RECORDID, SERIALNO, SC1, SC2, SC3 FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_TMP WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(ATTACHFILEHREF) FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE ATTACHFILEHREF = #href#
SELECT REFORMFLAG FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE FORMID = #formId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FORM.REFORMFLAG FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO TMP RIGHT JOIN TBL_FORMINFO FORM ON FORM.FORMID = TMP.FORMID AND FORM.TENANT_ID = TMP.TENANT_ID AND FORM.COMPANYID = TMP.COMPANYID WHERE TMP.HREF = #formUrl# AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT FORMID FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID = #ownerId# AND SN = #sn# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT DOCINFO.FORMID, FORMINFO.REFORMFLAG FROM (SELECT DOCID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, FORMID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO UNION SELECT DOCID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, FORMID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO) DOCINFO LEFT JOIN TBL_FORMINFO FORMINFO ON FORMINFO.FORMID = DOCINFO.FORMID AND FORMINFO.COMPANYID = DOCINFO.COMPANYID AND FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = DOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE DOCINFO.DOCID = #docId# AND DOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyId# AND DOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_EXPAPRLINE WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(HREF,'NULL') as HREF FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DOCDELIVERY SET HREF = #v_HREF# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UPDATE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# WHERE DOCID = (SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_RECORD WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)
sqlMap.select: select EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 companyID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 companyName from tbl_deptmaster d where cn = (select department from tbl_usermaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) and tenant_id = #tenantId# union select EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 companyID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 companyName from tbl_deptmaster d where cn in (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId#) and tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT NVL ( EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, ( SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'docNumZeroCnt' AND TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# ) ) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND CN = #v_companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = #v_docNumZeroCnt# WHERE CN = EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND CN = #v_companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND SHAREUSERID = #v_USERID#

SELECT CASE WHEN B.DOCID = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN #v_DOCSTATE# = '017' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_APRMEMBERSN# AND APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002' AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) ELSE 0 END) ELSE COUNT(B.DOCID) END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DOCID) DOCID FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_APRMEMBERSN# AND APRSTATE IN ('002', '005', '000')
AND DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) B GROUP BY B.DOCID
SELECT RECEIPTPOINTNAME FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY DEPTMEMBERSN ASC

SELECT APRMEMBERNAME FROM ( SELECT * FROM tbl_endaprlineinfo WHERE docid = ( SELECT orgdocid FROM tbl_aprdocinfo WHERE docid = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) ORDER BY aprmembersn DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT aprmembername FROM ( SELECT * FROM tbl_aprlineinfo WHERE docid = #v_DOCID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY aprmembersn ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (APRTYPE = '008' OR APRTYPE = '011') AND APRSTATE = '001'
sqlMap.update: update tbl_expaprdocinfo a set (cabinetid, taskcode) = ( SELECT cabinetid, taskcode FROM tbl_expendaprdocinfo WHERE docid = ( SELECT orgdocid FROM tbl_aprdocinfo WHERE docid = #docID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) WHERE a.docid = #docID# AND a.companyid = #companyID# AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(ORGDOCID, ' ') AS ORGDOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT NVL(MAX(OPINIONSN), 0) OPINIONSN FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT HREF FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE sn = #tmpSN# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND OWNERID = #id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO (DocID, UserID, OpinionGB, Content, UserName, UserName2, UserJobTitle, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptID, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, OpinionSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#v_ORGDOCID#, #v_USERID#, #v_OPINIONGB#, #v_CONTENT#, #v_USERNAME#, #v_USERNAME2#, #v_USERJOBTITLE#, #v_USERJOBTITLE2#, #v_USERDEPTID#, #v_USERDEPTNAME#, #v_USERDEPTNAME2# , #v_ORGOPINIONSN#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT href FROM tbl_tmpaprdocinfo WHERE ownerid = #v_PUSERID# AND sn = #v_PSN# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_expaprdocinfo set cabinetid = #cabinetID#, taskcode = #taskCode# WHERE docid = #docID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE HREF = #href# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID#
SELECT ownerdeptid FROM tbl_cabinetclass WHERE cabinetclassno = ( SELECT cabinetclassno FROM tbl_cabinet WHERE cabinetid = #cabinetId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyID# )
SELECT cn as id, department as dept, extensionattribute5 as bujaeInfo, title FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute5 like #id# || ':%'
SELECT cn as id, deptid as dept, proxy as bujaeInfo, title FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND proxy like #id# || ':%'

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM ( SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 LIKE CONCAT(#v_USERID#, ':%') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CN IN ( SELECT DISTINCT APRMEMBERID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '002' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )

select.isEqual: SELECT tbl_forminfo.aproption FROM tbl_aprdocinfo inner JOIN tbl_forminfo ON tbl_aprdocinfo.FORMID = tbl_forminfo.FORMID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.tenant_id = tbl_forminfo.tenant_id AND tbl_aprdocinfo.companyid = tbl_forminfo.companyid WHERE tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = #v_KEY#
SELECT tbl_forminfo.aproption FROM tbl_forminfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #v_KEY#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET PROCESSORID = #v_PROCESSORID#, PROCESSORNAME = #v_PROCESSORNAME#, PROCESSORNAME2 = #v_PROCESSORNAME2#, PROCESSORJOBTITLE = #v_PROCESSORJOBTITLE#, PROCESSORJOBTITLE2 = #v_PROCESSORJOBTITLE2#, RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID#, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME#, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET APRSTATE = '011', RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID#, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME#, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2#, PROCESSDATE = TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = (SELECT DEPTID FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# and COMPANYID = #companyID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = '9999999999' AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = '9999999999' AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME, SENTDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET SENTDEPTID = #v_SENTDEPTID#, SENTDEPTNAME = #v_SENTDEPTNAME#, SENTDEPTNAME2 = #v_SENTDEPTNAME2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN FORMNAME ELSE CASE WHEN (FORMNAME2 = '' OR FORMNAME2 IS NULL) THEN FORMNAME ELSE FORMNAME2 END END AS FORMNAME FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO E INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO X ON E.DOCID = X.DOCID AND E.TENANT_ID = X.TENANT_ID AND E.COMPANYID = X.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CONTAINER C ON E.CONTAINERID = C.CONTAINERID AND E.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND E.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE C.CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptId# AND E.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND E.COMPANYID = #companyId#

SELECT DISTINCT A.SHARE_ID as shareId, CASE WHEN A.SHARE_TYPE = 'U' THEN CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END WHEN A.SHARE_TYPE = 'D' THEN CASE WHEN (#lang# = '' OR #lang# IS NULL) THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END END AS shareName, A.SHARE_TYPE as shareType FROM TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON (A.SHARE_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON (A.SHARE_ID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE (A.OWNER_ID = #userId# OR A.OWNER_ID = #deptId#) AND A.SHARE_TYPE = #shareType# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO (DOCID, SN, FILEOPENFLAG, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#v_DOCID#, #v_ATTACHFILESN#, 'Y', #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM
tbl_aprattachinfo a
tbl_endattachinfo a
INNER JOIN tbl_opengovfileinfo b ON a.docid = b.docid AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id AND a.attachfilesn = b.sn AND a.companyid = b.companyid WHERE a.DOCID = #docID# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND a.COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO (DOCID, OPENFLAG,BASIS, REASON, LISTOPENFLAG, CREATEDATE, OPENLIMITDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#docID#, #openFlag#, #basis#, #reason#, #openGovListFlag#, SYSDATE, #limitDate#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO SET FILEOPENFLAG = #fileOpenFlag# WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND SN = #sn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT BASIS, REASON, LISTOPENFLAG, OPENLIMITDATE FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT FILEOPENFLAG FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SN ASC
SELECT SN FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SN ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_GONGRAMLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_docID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #v_companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO (DocID, AprMemberSN, AprType, AprState, AprMemberID, AprMemberIsDeptYN, AprMemberName, AprMemberName2, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2, AprMemberLDAPPath, ReceivedDate, ProcessDate, ReasonDoNotApprov, isProposerYN, isBriefUserYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_gongRamDocID#, AprMemberSN, AprType, '002', AprMemberID, AprMemberIsDeptYN, AprMemberName, AprMemberName2, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2, AprMemberLDAPPath, #v_SYSDATE#, ProcessDate, ReasonDoNotApprov, isProposerYN, isBriefUserYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_GONGRAMLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRLINE (DocID, AprMemberSN, OrgUserID, ProxyUserID, proxyusername, proxyusername2, proxyuserjobtitle, proxyuserjobtitle2, proxyuserdeptid, proxyuserdeptname, proxyuserdeptname2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_gongRamDocID#, AprMemberSN, AprMemberID, '' , '' , '' , '' , '' , '' , '' , '' , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_GONGRAMLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_GONGRAMLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

select.isEqual: SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, PROCESSDATE, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, REASONDONOTAPPROV FROM TBL_GONGRAMLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, TBL_APRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = #docID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT row_number() over(ORDER BY NULL) as rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, NVL(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME) AS FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, NVL(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL,'') AS SECURITYAPPROVAL, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 companyName, TBL_DEPTMASTER.COMPNM2 companyName2, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.OPENFLAG, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.LISTOPENFLAG, TO_CHAR(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.OPENLIMITDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPENLIMITDATE, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.UPDATEDATE, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.CREATEDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
INNER JOIN TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.OPENGOVFLAG = 'Y' WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
DOCNO LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
CASE WHEN (#v_MULTIDATALANG# = '' OR #v_MULTIDATALANG# IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME WHEN #v_MULTIDATALANG# = '2' THEN WRITERNAME2 ELSE WRITERNAME END LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
CASE WHEN (#v_MULTIDATALANG# = '' OR #v_MULTIDATALANG# IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME WHEN #v_MULTIDATALANG# = '2' THEN WRITERDEPTNAME2 ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME END LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
FORMID = #v_FORMID#
(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL AND CONTAINERID NOT IN ( SELECT containerid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = '999' )
CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
#v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER# GROUP BY TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, TBL_DEPTMASTER.COMPNM2, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.OPENFLAG, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.LISTOPENFLAG, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.OPENLIMITDATE, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.UPDATEDATE, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.CREATEDATE
AND ( PROCESSYN <> 'H' AND PROCESSYN <> 'I' AND PROCESSYN <> 'N' OR PROCESSYN IS NULL)
PROCESSYN = #v_PROCESSYN#
ORDER BY
DOCNO DESC, DOCTITLE DESC, WRITERNAME DESC, OPENFLAG DESC, COMPANYNAME DESC, WRITERDEPTNAME DESC, LISTOPENFLAG DESC, OPENLIMITDATE DESC, UPDATEDATE DESC, FORMNAME DESC, EDMSYN DESC, DOCSTATENAME DESC, CREATEDATE DESC, HASATTACHYN DESC, SENDFLAG DESC, ISPUBLIC DESC,
ENDDATE DESC ENDDATE DESC
ENDDATE DESC, DOCNO DESC
) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#
) B WHERE B.rnum >= #v_PAGESIZE3# + 1 ORDER BY
DOCNO DESC, DOCTITLE DESC, WRITERNAME DESC, OPENFLAG DESC, COMPANYNAME DESC, WRITERDEPTNAME DESC, LISTOPENFLAG DESC, OPENLIMITDATE DESC, UPDATEDATE DESC, FORMNAME DESC, EDMSYN DESC, DOCSTATENAME DESC, CREATEDATE DESC, HASATTACHYN DESC, SENDFLAG DESC, ISPUBLIC DESC, ENDDATE DESC ENDDATE
ENDDATE, DOCNO

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID,TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.OPENGOVFLAG = 'Y' WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
DOCNO LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
CASE WHEN (#v_MULTIDATALANG# = '' OR #v_MULTIDATALANG# IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME WHEN #v_MULTIDATALANG# = '2' THEN WRITERNAME2 ELSE WRITERNAME END LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
CASE WHEN (#v_MULTIDATALANG# = '' OR #v_MULTIDATALANG# IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME WHEN #v_MULTIDATALANG# = '2' THEN WRITERDEPTNAME2 ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME END LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
FORMID = #v_FORMID#
(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE2# , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL AND CONTAINERID NOT IN ( SELECT containerid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = '999' )
CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
#v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND ( PROCESSYN <> 'H' AND PROCESSYN <> 'I' AND PROCESSYN <> 'N' OR PROCESSYN IS NULL)
PROCESSYN = #v_PROCESSYN#
DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER#
)

SELECT DOCTITLE, WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME, DOCNO, PUBLICITYCODE, LISTOPENFLAG, REASON, BASIS, OPENLIMITDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO a INNER JOIN TBL_RECORD b ON a.DOCID = b.DOCID AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID AND a.COMPANYID = b.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO c ON a.DOCID = c.DOCID AND a.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID AND a.COMPANYID = c.COMPANYID WHERE a.DOCID = #docID# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND a.COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET PUBLICITYCODE = #publicityCode# WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UPDATE TBL_RECORD SET PUBLICITYCODE = #publicityCode# WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

UPDATE TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO SET OPENFLAG = #openFlag#, LISTOPENFLAG = #openGovListFlag#, BASIS = #basis#, REASON = #reason#, OPENLIMITDATE = TO_DATE(#limitDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SENDFLAG = 'N', UPDATEDATE = SYSDATE WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

UPDATE TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO SET createdate = TO_DATE(#nowDateTime#, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS'), sendflag = 'N'
WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

UPDATE TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO SET
FILEOPENFLAG = 'Y'
FILEOPENFLAG = 'N'
WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(SN) FROM TBL_OPENGOVMODIFYHISTORY WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
SELECT MAX(SN) FROM TBL_OPENGOVMODIFYHISTORY WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_OPENGOVMODIFYHISTORY (DOCID, MODIFIERNAME, SN, MODIFIERDEPTNAME, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYREASON, TENANTID, COMPANYID, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERDEPTID) VALUES (#docID#, #modifierName#, #sn#, #modifierDeptName#, TO_DATE(#modifyDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #modifyReason#, #tenantID#, #companyID#, #modifierId#, #modifierDeptId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(OPENLIMITDATE, 'N') AS openlitdate FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO SET DOCSIZE = #docSize# WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UPDATE TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO SET SENDFLAG = 'Y' WHERE createdate < curdate()
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_apropinioninfo WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND OPINIONGB != '004' AND OPINIONGB != '002'
DELETE FROM tbl_apropinioninfo WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID != #userID# AND OPINIONGB != '001'
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT SUM(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN (A.APR = 'TRUE' AND (A.APRSTATE = '002' OR A.APRSTATE = '005' OR A.APRSTATE = '000' ) AND A.APRTYPE != '015' AND A.FUNCTIONTYPE != '004') OR (A.APR = 'FALSE' AND A.APRTYPE = '007' AND (A.APRSTATE = '002' OR A.APRSTATE = '000' ) AND A.APRTYPE != '015' AND A.FUNCTIONTYPE != '004') THEN A.COUNT ELSE 0 END) FROM ( SELECT L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, 'TRUE' AS APR, COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT, L.aprmemberjobtitle FROM tbl_aprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON D.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND D.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 AND ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
OR ( L.APRMEMBERID IN
#proxyList[].id#
AND L.aprmemberdeptid IN
#proxyList[].dept#
AND L.aprmemberjobtitle IN
#proxyList[].title#
)
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, D.STARTDATE, D.TENANT_ID, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID, L.aprmemberjobtitle UNION ALL SELECT L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, 'FALSE' AS APR, COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT, L.aprmemberjobtitle FROM tbl_endaprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo E ON D.DOCID = E.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON D.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND D.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 AND ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
OR ( L.APRMEMBERID IN
#proxyList[].id#
AND L.APRMEMBERDEPTID IN
#proxyList[].dept#
AND L.aprmemberjobtitle IN
#proxyList[].title#
)
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, D.STARTDATE, D.TENANT_ID, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID, L.aprmemberjobtitle ) A )) AS "count1" , SUM(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN (A.APR = 'TRUE' AND (A.APRSTATE = '002' OR A.APRSTATE = '005' OR A.APRSTATE = '000' ) AND A.APRTYPE != '015' AND A.FUNCTIONTYPE = '004') OR (A.APR = 'FALSE' AND A.APRTYPE = '007' AND (A.APRSTATE = '002' OR A.APRSTATE = '000' ) AND A.APRTYPE != '015' AND A.FUNCTIONTYPE = '004') THEN A.COUNT ELSE 0 END) FROM ( SELECT L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, 'TRUE' AS APR, COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT, L.aprmemberjobtitle FROM tbl_aprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON D.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND D.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 AND ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
OR ( L.APRMEMBERID IN
#proxyList[].id#
AND L.aprmemberdeptid IN
#proxyList[].dept#
AND L.aprmemberjobtitle IN
#proxyList[].title#
)
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, D.STARTDATE, D.TENANT_ID, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID, L.aprmemberjobtitle UNION ALL SELECT L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, 'FALSE' AS APR, COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT, L.aprmemberjobtitle FROM tbl_endaprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo E ON D.DOCID = E.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON D.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND D.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 AND ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
OR ( L.APRMEMBERID IN
#proxyList[].id#
AND L.APRMEMBERDEPTID IN
#proxyList[].dept#
AND L.aprmemberjobtitle IN
#proxyList[].title#
)
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, D.STARTDATE, D.TENANT_ID, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID, L.aprmemberjobtitle ) A )) AS "count24" , SUM(( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(D.DOCID, D.COMPANYID)) FROM tbl_aprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON D.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND D.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE L.APRTYPE != '015' AND D.DOCSTATE != '017' AND D.FUNCTIONTYPE != '004'
AND L.APRSTATE != '001'
AND ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND L.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 )) AS "count2", SUM((
SELECT COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO D LEFT JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND L.APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON D.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND D.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE D.STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND D.DOCSTATE <> '017' AND L.APRTYPE <> '015' AND D.FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004'
AND ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
)
AND D.DocState <> '017' AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 )) AS "count3", SUM(( SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID
WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN != 'Y' AND (( (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #upperDeptCode#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011') )
OR ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
#upperDeptIDArr[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014', '015') AND PROCESSORID IS NULL )
OR ( (TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND
TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTID#
TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #upperDeptCode#
AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = '') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '013' ) OR ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' )
) AND ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID != #v_RELAYFORMID# OR ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '011' ) )
AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
)) AS "count4", SUM(( SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND ( ( ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# ) AND ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015' ) ) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
OR ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014') OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015' ) )
OR ( ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# ) AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTID# AND ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = '' ) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '013' )
) AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# )) AS "count5", SUM((
SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
)) AS "count6", SUM((
SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'O' AND STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
)) AS "count7", SUM(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN A.APR = 'TRUE' AND A.APRSTATE = '002' AND A.DOCSTATE = '015' AND A.APRTYPE = '015'
AND A.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
THEN A.COUNT ELSE 0 END ) FROM ( SELECT L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, 'TRUE' AS APR, COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM tbl_aprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID WHERE ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, D.STARTDATE, D.TENANT_ID, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID UNION ALL SELECT L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, 'FALSE' AS APR, COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM tbl_endaprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo E ON D.DOCID = E.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID WHERE ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, D.STARTDATE, D.TENANT_ID, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID ) A )) AS "count99", SUM(( SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID IN
#v_USERIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType = '015' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState = '010' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# )) AS "count10", SUM((
SELECT COUNT(SN) AS COUNT FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO TMP LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON TMP.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND TMP.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND CONCAT(CONCAT(TMP.OWNERID, '@'), TMP.SN) = GRP.DOCID WHERE TMP.OWNERID = #v_USERID# AND TMP.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TMP.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TMP.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TMP.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1
)) AS "count21", SUM(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN A.APR = 'FALSE' AND A.APRTYPE = '040' AND A.APRSTATE = '002'
AND A.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
THEN A.COUNT ELSE 0 END ) FROM ( SELECT L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, 'TRUE' AS APR, COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID, L.aprmemberjobtitle FROM tbl_aprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID WHERE ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
OR ( L.APRMEMBERID IN
#proxyList[].id#
AND L.aprmemberdeptid IN
#proxyList[].dept#
AND L.aprmemberjobtitle IN
#proxyList[].title#
)
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, D.STARTDATE, D.TENANT_ID, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID, L.aprmemberjobtitle UNION ALL SELECT L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, 'FALSE' AS APR, COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID, L.aprmemberjobtitle FROM tbl_endaprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo E ON D.DOCID = E.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID WHERE ( L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
OR ( L.APRMEMBERID IN
#proxyList[].id#
AND L.APRMEMBERDEPTID IN
#proxyList[].dept#
AND L.aprmemberjobtitle IN
#proxyList[].title#
)
)
AND D.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND D.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# GROUP BY L.APRSTATE, D.FUNCTIONTYPE, L.APRTYPE, D.DOCSTATE, L.APRMEMBERSN, L.APRMEMBERID, D.STARTDATE, D.TENANT_ID, L.APRMEMBERDEPTID, L.aprmemberjobtitle
) A ))AS "countWHO"
, SUM(( SELECT SUM(A.COUNT) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM tbl_aprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID WHERE (L.APRSTATE = '002' OR L.APRSTATE = '005') AND (D.FUNCTIONTYPE != '004' OR L.APRTYPE != '007') AND D.STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND L.APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND SHAREUSERID = #v_USERID#) AND L.APRTYPE != '015'
AND STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(D.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM tbl_endaprdocinfo D JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo E ON D.DOCID = E.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID WHERE L.APRTYPE IN ('007', '040') AND L.APRSTATE = '002' AND D.DOCSTATE != '031' AND L.APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND SHAREUSERID = #v_USERID#) AND L.APRTYPE != '015'
AND STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# ) A )) AS "count11"
, SUM((
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(A.DOCID)) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO C ON A.DOCID = C.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.DOCTYPE ='001' AND A.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND A.WRITERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.ENDDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND B.DELFLAG IS NULL AND C.PROCESSYN = 'N'
)) AS "countUntreated" ,SUM(( SELECT COUNT(RecordID) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_RECORD.RecordID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo FROM TBL_RECORD Left Join TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_RECORD.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ENDDOCNO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID = ENDDOCNO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_RECORD.DOCID Inner Join TBL_SEPERATEATTACH ON TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID
Left Join TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID
LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_RECORD.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID Inner Join TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID = TBL_RECORD.DOCID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID IS NOT NULL Inner Join ( Select ProcessDeptCode, ProcessDeptName, ProcessDeptName2, TaskCode, TaskName, TaskName2, VolumeNo, CabinetID, TCabinetID, TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, DisplayEndDate, DisplayReason, ConfirmFlag, ProductionYear, RegSerialNo, DisplayRecFlag, ExTransYear, TransDelayReason, TransDelayFlag, OwnerDeptID, OwnerTask, TerminateFlag, ExpirationYear, KeepingPeriod , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET On TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND ConfirmFlag = '0') AND TRIM(OwnerDeptID) = #v_DEPTID# ) TBL_CABINET ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.CabinetID WHERE TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_RECORD.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE = '001' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo = '00' AND TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag = '0' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('N','T') AND TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate >= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate <= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS')
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL OR ( SELECT 'Y' FROM DUAL WHERE 0 < ( SELECT COUNT(DocID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DocID = TBL_RECORD.DocID AND AprMemberID = #v_USERID# ) OR TBL_RECORD.DocID = NULL ) = 'Y' ) AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL ) AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID= #companyID#
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL ))) AS "count96", SUM(( SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
LEFT JOIN TBL_RECORD_TEMP ON TBL_RECORD_TEMP.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.COMPANYID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID
WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN != 'Y' AND (((TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '011'))
OR ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014', '015') AND PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# )
OR ( (TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND TBL_RECORD_TEMP.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '013' ) OR ( TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' )
) AND ( TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID != #v_RELAYFORMID# OR (TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID = #v_RELAYFORMID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE != '011') )
AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
)) AS "count97" , SUM(( SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN (SELECT DOCID, DOCSTATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO) TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE ((TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = '011' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE != '011' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID#))
AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = '015' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# )) AS "count98" FROM DUAL ) B
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_apropinioninfo (DOCID, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, OPINIONSN, USERNAME2, USERJOBTITLE2, USERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_NEWID#, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, OPINIONSN, USERNAME2, USERJOBTITLE2, USERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, #receiptCompanyID# FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_orgDocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#)

INSERT INTO tbl_apropinioninfo (DOCID, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, OPINIONSN, USERNAME2, USERJOBTITLE2, USERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) SELECT #v_NEWID#, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, OPINIONSN, USERNAME2, USERJOBTITLE2, USERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, #receiptCompanyID# FROM tbl_endapropinioninfo WHERE DOCID = #v_orgDocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , PROCESSDATE , RECEIVEDDATE , APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '004' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , PROCESSDATE , RECEIVEDDATE , APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '001' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = '003' WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRSTATE = '002' AND APRTYPE <> '007'
UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = '001' WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '004' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(PASSAPRLINEFLAG, 'N') AS PASSAPRLINEFLAG FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = ( SELECT FORMID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT * FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO D INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO L ON D.DOCID = L.DOCID AND D.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND D.COMPANYID = L.COMPANYID WHERE D.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND L.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND L.APRSTATE = '003' AND ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TMPAPRLINEINFO WHERE OWNERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND SN = #v_DOCSN# AND (TRIM(APRSTATE) = '' OR TRIM(APRSTATE) IS NULL OR APRSTATE IS NULL)

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET DELFLAG = #v_DELFLAG#, SUMMARY = #v_SUMMARY# WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET DELFLAG = NULL, SUMMARY = NULL WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT MAX(CNT) FROM ((SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS CNT FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND (ISBIGATTACH = 'N' OR (ISBIGATTACH = 'Y' AND ISBIGATTACHDEL = 'N')) )
UNION ALL
(SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS CNT FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND (ISBIGATTACH = 'N' OR (ISBIGATTACH = 'Y' AND ISBIGATTACHDEL = 'N')) ) )

SELECT MAX(CNT) FROM ((SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS CNT FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND ISBIGATTACH = 'Y' )
UNION ALL
(SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS CNT FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND ISBIGATTACH = 'Y' ) )
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_APRBIGATTACH_DOWNLOADINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN#
SELECT DOWNLOAD_COUNT FROM TBL_APRBIGATTACH_DOWNLOADINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRBIGATTACH_DOWNLOADINFO (DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, DOWNLOAD_COUNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#v_DOCID#, #v_ATTACHFILESN#, 0, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRBIGATTACH_DOWNLOADINFO SET DOWNLOAD_COUNT = DOWNLOAD_COUNT + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APRBIGATTACH_DOWNLOADINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILEHREF, COMPANYID, 'APR' AS TBLNAME FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ISBIGATTACH = 'Y' AND ISBIGATTACHDEL = 'N'
UNION
SELECT DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILEHREF, COMPANYID, 'END' AS TBLNAME FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ISBIGATTACH = 'Y' AND ISBIGATTACHDEL = 'N'

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_APRATTACHINFO SET ISBIGATTACHDEL = 'Y' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN#
UPDATE TBL_ENDATTACHINFO SET ISBIGATTACHDEL = 'Y' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT MIN(SUBSTR(SAVEDATE, 0, 10)) FROM ((SELECT NVL(MIN(TO_CHAR(SAVEDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD')), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE ,'YYYY/MM/DD')) AS SAVEDATE FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT NVL(MIN(TO_CHAR(SAVEDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD')), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE ,'YYYY/MM/DD')) AS SAVEDATE FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#) )

SELECT docid ,aprmembersn ,aprtype ,aprstate ,aprmemberid FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE 1=1 AND APRMEMBERID = #aprMemberId# AND APRTYPE = #aprType# AND APRSTATE = #aprState# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SUSINSCHEDULE ( DOCID , DEPTID , DIRPATH , DOCSTATE , COMPANYID , LANG , TENANTID, OFFSET ) VALUES ( #v_DOCID# , #v_DEPTID# , #v_DIRPATH# , #v_DOCSTATE# , #v_COMPANYID# , #v_LANG# , #v_TENANTID#, #v_OFFSET# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID, DEPTID, DIRPATH, DOCSTATE, COMPANYID, LANG, TENANTID, OFFSET FROM TBL_SUSINSCHEDULE
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SUSINSCHEDULE WHERE DOCID = #DOCID# AND DEPTID = #DEPTID# AND DIRPATH = #DIRPATH# AND DOCSTATE = #DOCSTATE# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANYID# AND LANG = #LANG# AND TENANTID = #TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT GRANTDEPTID FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN_GRANT WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE ROOTDOCID = ( SELECT ROOTDOCID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND DOCSTATE = '011' AND APRSTATE = '011' AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ROOTDOCID, DOCID
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(OPINIONSN), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DUPLFIRSTDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
INSERT INTO TBL_APROPINIONINFO (DOCID, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, OPINIONSN, USERNAME2, USERJOBTITLE2, USERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) SELECT #v_DUPLFIRSTDOCID#, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, #v_OPINIONSN#, USERNAME2, USERJOBTITLE2, USERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DUPLDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET ROOTDOCID = ( SELECT ROOTDOCID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE DOCID = #v_NEWID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT #v_DOCID# AS DOCID, A.DEPTID AS RECEIPTPOINTID, A.DEPTNAME AS RECEIPTPOINTNAME, #v_CURRRECEIPT.extReceptYN# AS EXTRECEPTYN, #v_CURRRECEIPT.processYN# AS PROCESSYN, #v_CURRRECEIPT.processSN# AS PROCESSSN, #v_CURRRECEIPT.canEditYN# AS CANEDITYN, #v_CURRRECEIPT.extRecepteMail# AS EXTRECEPTEMAIL, #v_CURRRECEIPT.receiptMemberID# AS RECEIPTMEMBERID, #v_CURRRECEIPT.receiptMemberName# AS RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, #v_CURRRECEIPT.processDate# AS PROCESSDATE, #v_CURRRECEIPT.receiptMemberJobTitle# AS RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE, #v_CURRRECEIPT.deptMemberSN# AS DEPTMEMBERSN, A.DEPTNAME2 AS RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, #v_CURRRECEIPT.receiptMemberJobTitle2# AS RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2, #v_CURRRECEIPT.receiptMemberName2# AS RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, #v_CURRRECEIPT.routeYN# AS ROUTEYN, #v_TENANTID# AS TENANT_ID, #companyID# AS COMPANYID, B.DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB A LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.MAINID = #v_MAINID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY A.SUBID
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO (DOCID, RECEIPTPOINTID, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, EXTRECEPTYN, PROCESSYN, PROCESSSN, CANEDITYN, EXTRECEPTEMAIL, RECEIPTMEMBERID, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, PROCESSDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE, DEPTMEMBERSN, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, ROUTEYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID)
SELECT #v_DOCID#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].receiptPointID#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].receiptPointName#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].extReceptYN#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].processYN#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].processSN#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].canEditYN#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].extRecepteMail#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].receiptMemberID#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].receiptMemberName#, TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_NEWRECEIPTS[].processDate#, 0, 19),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].receiptMemberJobTitle#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].deptMemberSN#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].receiptPointName2#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].receiptMemberJobTitle2#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].receiptMemberName2#, #v_NEWRECEIPTS[].routeYN#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID# FROM DUAL

select.isEqual: SELECT ROWNUM AS SN, RECEIPTPOINTID, CASE WHEN (#v_LANG# = '' OR #v_LANG# IS NULL) THEN RECEIPTPOINTNAME ELSE RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 END AS DISPLAYRECEIPTPOINTNAME, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, CASE WHEN (#v_LANG# = '' OR #v_LANG# IS NULL) THEN RECEIPTMEMBERNAME ELSE RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 END AS DISPLAYRECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY DEPTMEMBERSN

SELECT ROWNUM AS SN, DEPTID AS RECEIPTPOINTID, CASE WHEN (#v_LANG# = '' OR #v_LANG# IS NULL) THEN DEPTNAME ELSE DEPTNAME2 END AS DISPLAYRECEIPTPOINTNAME, DEPTNAME AS RECEIPTPOINTNAME, DEPTNAME2 AS RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, '' AS DISPLAYRECEIPTMEMBERNAME, '' AS RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, '' AS RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE MAINID = #v_MAINID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SUBID

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO SET ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME = #v_DISPLAYNAME# WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILENAME = #v_ATTACHFILENAME# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UPDATE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO SET CONTAINERID = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.DOCSTATE, A.FUNCTIONTYPE, B.DOCSTATE AS PROCDOCSTATE, B.APRSTATE AS PROCAPRSTATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND B.PARENTSDOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERSN > #v_APRMEMBERSN# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
sqlMap.update: Update TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET ProcessDocID = #v_PROCESSDOCID# , AprState = #v_APRSTATE# Where DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ReceivedDeptID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(XFROMCODE, 1, 1) = 'M' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(XFROMCODE, 1, 2) = 'MA' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END FROM TBL_RECRELAYINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT XFROMCODE AS DEPTCODE, MFROM AS DEPTNAME FROM TBL_RECRELAYINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO (DOCID, RECEIPTPOINTID, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, EXTRECEPTYN, PROCESSYN, PROCESSSN, CANEDITYN, EXTRECEPTEMAIL, RECEIPTMEMBERID, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, PROCESSDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE, DEPTMEMBERSN, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, ROUTEYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#DOCID#, #DEPTCODE#,#DEPTNAME#, 'Y', 'N', '1', 'N', '', '', '', NULL, '', '1', #DEPTNAME#,'','',null, #TENANT_ID#, #COMPANYID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT RECEIPTPOINTNAME AS RECEIPTDEPTNAME, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 AS RECEIPTDEPTNAME2, STATUSDATE, CASE WHEN STATUS = 'A' THEN '도착' WHEN STATUS = 'C' THEN '시스템삭제' WHEN STATUS = 'E' THEN '전송실패' WHEN STATUS = 'H' THEN '회송' WHEN STATUS = 'I' THEN '접수' WHEN STATUS = 'N' THEN '대기' WHEN STATUS = 'O' THEN '발송의뢰' WHEN STATUS = 'R' THEN '수신' WHEN STATUS = 'S' THEN '발송' WHEN STATUS = 'T' THEN '재발송대기' WHEN STATUS = 'Y' THEN '수신완료' WHEN STATUS = 'V' THEN '도달' END STATUS FROM TBL_HISTORYRECEIPTINFO LEFT JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_HISTORYRECEIPTINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID LEFT JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_HISTORYRECEIPTINFO.RECEIPTDEPTID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID WHERE (TBL_HISTORYRECEIPTINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# OR TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID = #v_DOCID#) AND RECEIPTDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TBL_HISTORYRECEIPTINFO.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TBL_HISTORYRECEIPTINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY STATUSDATE DESC

SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID, TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDOCTYPE, TBL_FORMINFO.FORMFILELOCATION FROM TBL_FORMINFO
INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID = TBL_FORMCONTAINER.FORMCONTID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMCONTAINER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMCONTAINER.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP ON TBL_FORMCONTAINER.FORMCONTID = TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.FORMCONTID AND TBL_FORMCONTAINER.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMCONTAINER.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.COMPANYID
WHERE TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
AND (TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.FORMCONTUSERDEPID = #v_DEPTID# OR TBL_FORMCONTAINER.FORMCONTOWNDEPID = 'ALL')
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDRAFTALLFLAG = 'Y' ORDER BY FORMORDER
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRATTACHINFO (DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, PAGENUM, DISPLAYNAME, BODYATTACH, AttachUserName2, AttachUserJobTitle2, AttachUserDeptName2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, ISBIGATTACH, ISBIGATTACHDEL, SAVEDATE) (SELECT #currentDocID#, ATTACHFILESN, VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILENAME, CONCAT(#dirPath#, REPLACE(SUBSTR(ATTACHFILEHREF, INSTR(ATTACHFILEHREF, '/', -1, 1) + 1), #mainDocID#, #currentDocID#)) as ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, PAGENUM, DISPLAYNAME, BODYATTACH, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, ISBIGATTACH, ISBIGATTACHDEL, SAVEDATE FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #mainDocID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO (DOCID, ATTACHSN, ATTACHDOCNAME, ATTACHDOCURL, SUBATTACHYN, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #currentDocID#, ATTACHSN, ATTACHDOCNAME, ATTACHDOCURL, SUBATTACHYN, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #mainDocID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO (DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYFLAG, PAGENUM, CHKFLAG, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #currentDocID#, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYFLAG, PAGENUM, CHKFLAG, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #mainDocID#)
