INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO (DocID, AprMemberSN, AprType, AprState, AprMemberID, AprMemberIsDeptYN, AprMemberName, AprMemberName2, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2, AprMemberLDAPPath, ReceivedDate, ProcessDate, ReasonDoNotApprov, isProposerYN, isBriefUserYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #currentDocID#, AprMemberSN, AprType, AprState, AprMemberID, AprMemberIsDeptYN, AprMemberName, AprMemberName2, AprMemberJobTitle, AprMemberJobTitle2, AprMemberDeptID, AprMemberDeptName, AprMemberDeptName2, AprMemberLDAPPath, ReceivedDate, ProcessDate, ReasonDoNotApprov, isProposerYN, isBriefUserYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #mainDocID#)

AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO (DOCID, TABSN, GROUPDOCSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE) VALUES (#v_DOCID#, #v_TABSN#, #v_GROUPDOCSN#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, 'TMP')
INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO (DOCID, TABSN, GROUPDOCSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TYPE) VALUES (#v_DOCID#, #v_TABSN#, #v_GROUPDOCSN#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, 'APR')
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DOCID, TABSN, GROUPDOCSN,
(SELECT HREF FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST B WHERE B.DOCID = A.DOCID AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AS DOCHREF, (SELECT HASOPINIONYN FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST B WHERE B.DOCID = A.DOCID AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AS HASOPINIONYN, (SELECT ORGDOCID FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST B WHERE B.DOCID = A.DOCID AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AS ORGDOCID, TENANT_ID, (SELECT DOCTYPE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST B WHERE B.DOCID = A.DOCID AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AS DOCTYPE,
( SELECT E.HREF FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), SN) AS DOCID, HREF FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ) E WHERE E.DOCID = A.DOCID ) AS DOCHREF,
( SELECT E.HASOPINIONYN FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), SN) AS DOCID, NVL(HASOPINIONYN, 'N') AS HASOPINIONYN FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ) E WHERE E.DOCID = A.DOCID ) AS HASOPINIONYN,
( SELECT E.DOCTYPE FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(OWNERID, '@'), SN) AS DOCID, DOCTYPE FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ) E WHERE E.DOCID = A.DOCID ) AS DOCTYPE,
TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO A WHERE GROUPDOCSN = #v_GROUPDOCSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ORDER BY TABSN ASC
SELECT NVL(GROUPDOCSN, '') AS GROUPDOCSN FROM TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APROPINIONINFO (DOCID, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, OPINIONSN, USERNAME2, USERJOBTITLE2, USERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_ORGDOCID#, USERID, OPINIONGB, CONTENT, USERNAME, USERJOBTITLE, USERDEPTID, USERDEPTNAME, #v_NEWOPINIONSN#, USERNAME2, USERJOBTITLE2, USERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO OP WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_GROUPDOCSN# AND OPINIONGB = #v_OPINIONTYPE# AND OPINIONSN = ( SELECT MAX(OPINIONSN) FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_GROUPDOCSN# ) )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'APR' AS FLAG FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'END' AS FLAG FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT PreView FROM tbl_aprpreview WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_aprpreview SET PreView = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND UserID = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SERIAL_NOROLLBACK (TYPE1, TYPE2, TYPE3, TIMESEP, REGSERIALNO, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES ( (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = '0' THEN '0' ELSE #v_TYPE1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ) WHERE Code = '1'), (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = '0' THEN '0' ELSE #v_TYPE2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ) WHERE Code = '2'), (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = '0' THEN '0' ELSE #v_TYPE3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ) WHERE Code = '3'), (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = '1' THEN #v_TIMESEP# WHEN ISUsed = '2' THEN (SELECT TO_NUMBER(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) || REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0')) FROM DUAL) END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ) WHERE Code = '4'), #v_REGSERIALNO#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SERIAL_NOROLLBACK WHERE TYPE1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = '0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '1') AND TYPE2 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = '0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '2') AND TYPE3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = '0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '3') AND TIMESEP = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = '1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed = '2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) || REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) WHERE Code = '4') AND REGSERIALNO = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID2#
RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID#
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO (DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYFLAG, PAGENUM, CHKFLAG, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) (SELECT #v_DOCID#, VIEWORDER, ATTACHFILENAME, DISPLAYNAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, #v_ATTACHUSERID#, #v_ATTACHUSERNAME#, #v_ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE#, #v_ATTACHUSERDEPTID#, #v_ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME#, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '1', '001', PAGENUM, ' ', #v_ATTACHUSERNAME2#, #v_ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2#, #v_ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2#, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #beforeDocID#)

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO (DocID, UserID, OpinionGB, Content, UserName, UserName2, UserJobTitle, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptID, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, OpinionSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#v_DOCID#, #v_USERID#, #v_OPINIONGB#, #v_CONTENT#, #v_USERNAME#, #v_USERNAME2#, #v_USERJOBTITLE#, #v_USERJOBTITLE2#, #v_USERDEPTID#, #v_USERDEPTNAME#, #v_USERDEPTNAME2# , #v_OPINIONSN#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(OPINIONSN) FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OPINIONGB != '000'

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM
TBL_APROPINIONINFO
TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO
WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND OPINIONGB != '000'
AND OPINIONGB = '000'
) THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS Result FROM DUAL
SELECT HASOPINIONYN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CN USERID, DEPARTMENT DEPTID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 PROXY, DESCRIPTION DISPLAYNAME, DESCRIPTION2 DISPLAYNAME2, TITLE, TITLE2, '-1' JOBID from TBL_USERMASTER U where CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION All SELECT A.CN USERID, A.DEPTID , UNISTR(A.PROXY), B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, TITLE, TITLE2, JOBID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #userID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserRight) FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_RECROLEINFO ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_RECROLEINFO.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECROLEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = TBL_RECROLEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE ( TBL_RECROLEINFO.SeperateAttachNo = '00' ) AND (( TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserRight = '1' ) OR (TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserID = 'All_User' AND TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserRight = '2')) AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_RECORD.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT 'DOC' TYPE, DOCID, ENDDATE, DocTitle FILENAME, Href FILEPATH, 1 AS TYPESN, 1 AS VIEWSN, 1 AS ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID IN
#vDocIDMap[]#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL

#vDocIDMap[]#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATTDOC' TYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, ENDDATE, AttachDocName FILENAME, AttachDocURL FILEPATH, 3 AS TYPESN, ATTACHSN AS VIEWSN, 1 AS ATTACHFILESN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID IN
#vDocIDMap[]#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC, TYPESN ASC, ATTACHFILESN ASC, VIEWSN ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT #newDocID# NEWDOCID, ATTACHDOCNAME, ATTACHDOCURL, SUBATTACHYN, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID TENANTID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO VALUES ( #newDocID#, #attachSN#, #attachDocName#, #attachDocURL#, #subAttachYN#, #attachUserID#, #attachUserName#, #attachUserDeptID#, #attachUserDeptName#, #attachUserJobTitle#, #attachUserName2#, #attachUserJobTitle2#, #attachUserDeptName2#, #tenantID#, #companyID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH_TEMP WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SepAttachNo# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) = 0 THEN ( SELECT RECORDID FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH_TEMP WHERE DOCID = #orgDocID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = '00' AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) ELSE 'existence' END AS RECORDID FROM DUAL

UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = #aprState#, PROCESSDATE = NULL WHERE
APRMEMBERSN = #returnUserSN#
APRMEMBERSN > #returnUserSN# AND APRTYPE IN ('001', '019')
AND DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO DI JOIN (SELECT DOCID, ATTACHDOCURL, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO UNION ALL SELECT DOCID, ATTACHDOCURL, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO) AT ON AT.ATTACHDOCURL = DI.HREF AND AT.COMPANYID = DI.COMPANYID AND AT.TENANT_ID = DI.TENANT_ID WHERE AT.DOCID = #v_ParentID# AND DI.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DI.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DI.DOCID = #v_DOCID#

select.isEqual: SELECT WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITERJOBTITLE, WRITERJOBTITLE2, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITERJOBTITLE, WRITERJOBTITLE2, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT DOCID, FORMID, ORGDOCID, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, HREF, DOCTITLE, DOCNO, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITERJOBTITLE, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERJOBTITLE2, WRITERDEPTNAME2, ISPUBLIC, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT DOCID, FORMID, ORGDOCID, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, HREF, DOCTITLE, DOCNO, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITERJOBTITLE, WRITERJOBTITLE2, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME2, ISPUBLIC, COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT DISPLAYNAME, TITLE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, APRMEMBERSN, APRSTATE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND APRMEMBERSN IN (SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE APRMEMBERID = #userID#) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT APRSTATE, PROCESSYN, PROCESSORID, PROCESSDOCID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #deptId#
SELECT APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT DISTINCT ORGDOCID FROM VGONGRAMAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCID = #v_BEFOREDOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_EXPAPRLINE SET APRMEMBERSN = APRMEMBERSN - 1 WHERE DOCID = #v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_AprMemberSN#
UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRMEMBERSN = APRMEMBERSN - 1 WHERE DOCID = #v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_AprMemberSN#
UPDATE TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO SET CREATEDATE = SYSDATE WHERE DOCID = #DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANYID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT docTitle, docNumber FROM tbl_docdelivery WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT A.ORGANID , A.ORGAN , A.ORGAN2 , A.MANAGEDEPTID , A.MANAGEDEPT , A.MANAGEDEPT2 , A.RECEIPTDATE , to_char(A.RECEIPTDATE + #offsetMin#/(24*60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as href , NVL(B.CHARGENAME,'') AS chargeName , NVL(B.CHARGENAME2,'') AS chargeName2 , A.SN , A.ORGDOCID , A.DOCID , A.ORGANUSERNAME , A.ORGANUSERNAME2 FROM tbl_distributeInfo A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DOCID, ORGANID, MANAGEDEPTID, CHARGENAME, CHARGENAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM tbl_docdelivery WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY RECEIPTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1 ) B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.ORGANID = B.ORGANID AND A.MANAGEDEPTID = B.MANAGEDEPTID WHERE A.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND A.ORGANID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.DELIVERYSN = #v_DELIVERYSN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.receiptDate ASC
select.isNotEmpty:
WITH TD AS ( SELECT distinct A.*, B.CHARGENAME, B.CHARGENAME2 FROM tbl_distributeInfo A LEFT JOIN tbl_docdelivery B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.ORGANID = B.ORGANID AND A.MANAGEDEPTID = B.MANAGEDEPTID WHERE A.ORGDOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND A.PARENTDOCID in
#V_PARENTDOCIDLIST[]#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ) SELECT C.ORGANID , C.ORGAN , C.ORGAN2 , C.MANAGEDEPTID , C.MANAGEDEPT , C.MANAGEDEPT2 , C.RECEIPTDATE , to_char(C.RECEIPTDATE + #offsetMin#/(24*60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as href, NVL(D.CHARGENAME, '') as chargeName , NVL(D.CHARGENAME2, '') as chargeName2 , C.SN , C.ORGDOCID, C.DOCID, C.ORGANUSERNAME, C.ORGANUSERNAME2 FROM TD C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DOCID, ORGANID, MANAGEDEPTID, max(SN) as SN, CHARGENAME, CHARGENAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TD GROUP BY DOCID, ORGANID, MANAGEDEPTID, CHARGENAME, CHARGENAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) D ON C.DOCID = D.DOCID AND C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID AND C.ORGANID = D.ORGANID AND C.MANAGEDEPTID = D.MANAGEDEPTID AND C.SN = D.SN WHERE C.SN = #V_SN# AND C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PARENTDOCID FROM tbl_distributeInfo WHERE DOCID = #v_PARENTDOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ORGDOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND SN = #v_DistributeInfoSN# ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

select.isEmpty: SELECT NVL(MAX(SN), 0) AS SN FROM tbl_distributeInfo WHERE ORGDOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT NVL(MAX(SN), 0) AS SN FROM tbl_distributeInfo WHERE DOCID = #v_PARENTDOCID# AND DELIVERYSN = ( SELECT SN FROM tbl_docdelivery WHERE DOCID = #v_PARENTDOCID# AND DEPTID = #v_OrganID# ) AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(MAX(SN), 0) + 1 AS SN FROM tbl_distributeInfo WHERE DOCID = #v_PARENTDOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO tbl_distributeinfo (sn, DocID, ReceiptDate, OrganID, Organ, Organ2, DocNumber, ManageDeptID, ManageDept, ManageDept2, OrgDocNumCode, DocTitle, ParentDocID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DELIVERYSN, ORGDOCID, TYPE, ORGANUSERNAME, ORGANUSERNAME2) ( SELECT #v_DistributeInfoSN#, #v_DOCID#, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_OrganID#, #v_Organ#, #v_Organ2#, DocNumber, #v_ManageDeptID#, #v_ManageDept#, #v_ManageDept2#, OrgDocNumCode, DocTitle , #v_PARENTDOCID#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#, SN, #v_ORGDOCID#, #v_TYPE#, #v_ORGANUSERNAME1#, #v_ORGANUSERNAME2# FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND DeptID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )
insert.isNotEqual: INSERT INTO tbl_distributeinfo (sn, DocID, ReceiptDate, OrganID, Organ, Organ2, DocNumber, ManageDeptID, ManageDept, ManageDept2, OrgDocNumCode, DocTitle, ParentDocID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DELIVERYSN, ORGDOCID, TYPE, ORGANUSERNAME, ORGANUSERNAME2) ( SELECT #v_DistributeInfoSN#, a.DocID, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_OrganID#, #v_Organ#, #v_Organ2#, a.DocNo, #v_ManageDeptID#, #v_ManageDept#, #v_ManageDept2#, b.DocNumCode, a.DocTitle , #v_PARENTDOCID#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID#, #v_maxSN#, #v_ORGDOCID#, #v_TYPE#, #v_ORGANUSERNAME1#, #v_ORGANUSERNAME2# FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO a INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO b ON a.DocID = b.DocID AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID AND a.COMPANYID = b.COMPANYID WHERE a.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND a.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND a.COMPANYID = #companyID# )

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_distributeinfo WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT PUBLICITYYN FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_PDOCID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRTYPE = '015' AND DOCID = ( SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ORGDOCID = #v_GDocID# )

DELETE FROM TBL_EXPAPRLINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = ( SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ORGDOCID = #v_GDocID# )
DELETE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE ORGDOCID = #v_GDocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
DELETE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCSTATE = '015'
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.*, CASE WHEN O.FORMID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OFFICEFLAG, RECENDFORM.STARTDATE AS RESENDSTARTDATE FROM TBL_FORMINFO INNER JOIN ( SELECT FORMID, STARTDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT FORMID, STARTDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ) ) WHERE rn = 1 ) RECENDFORM ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID = RECENDFORM.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = RECENDFORM.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = RECENDFORM.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_FORM_OFFICE O ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID = O.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = O.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = O.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID IN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(FORMCONTID) FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND FORMCONTUSERDEPID = #deptId# UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(FORMCONTID) FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TO_CHAR(COMPANYID) = TO_CHAR(TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID) AND (FORMCONTOWNDEPID = 'ALL' OR FORMCONTOWNDEPID = #deptId#))
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #v_SEARCHNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONNFLAG != 'Y' AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY RESENDSTARTDATE DESC NULLS LAST ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT EDITVERSION FROM TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND EDITVERSION IS NOT NULL AND (ISBEFOREDOC = 'N' OR ISBEFOREDOC IS NULL OR TRIM(ISBEFOREDOC) = '') ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(EDITVERSION, 1, INSTR(EDITVERSION, '.') - 1)) DESC, TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(EDITVERSION, INSTR(EDITVERSION, '.') + 1)) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT RECEIVESN, DOCID, RECEIVEDDEPTID, DOCSTATE, APRSTATE, PROCESSORID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN# AND PROCESSYN <> 'Y'
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, USEUPPERDEPTBOX, DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #pDeptID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%' || #deptID# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USEUPPERDEPTBOX = 'Y'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_GONGRAMDELETEHISTORY ( DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, PROCESSDATE, DELETEDATE, REASONDONOTAPPROV, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, PROCESSDATE, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), REASONDONOTAPPROV, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_gongRamDocID# AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_APRMEMBERSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DOCID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, SUMMARY, SUMMARYPATH FROM
TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO
WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE
TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO
TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO
SET summary = #summary#, summaryPath = #summaryPath# WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
